" [SEP] "We are having the same issue that “dnn.controls.dnntoolbar.js” is loaded from the root and 404 happened when client dependency is enabled.  {quote}For the workaround, we fixed the function getScriptPath() in “dnn.js” to return the correct path rather than returning ““ empty so that the js file can be loaded correctly.  {quote}    ----   Upon investigation, the actual root cause is that '\_\_sp' variable is not being generated when the client scripts are registered in the function RegisterClientReference() of DotNetNuke.WebUtility\ClientAPI.vb   From the above code, RegisterClientScriptBlock() will never get called because IsClientScriptBlockRegistered(objPage, ""dnn.js"") always returns ‘True’. summary: "Switch from HTTP Module to OWIN hosting"
description: """It will be better to use OWIN so that we can take advantage of available middleware (JWT auth for example) instead of implementing in app layer"""
comments: "I found that using OWIN was pretty straightforward and requires minimal setup on the DNN side. As with a HTTP Handler, it's necessary to have a AUM exclusion [added to the host settings|https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Prototype.LiquidContent/blob/DNN-10451-spike-arch/src/Dnn.Module.LiquidContent/Providers/DataProviders/SqlDataProvider/00.00.01.SqlDataProvider#L3] but other than that it just work out of the box.    Problems will arise though when there would be another extension trying to use OWIN for hosting because there can be only one startup class. In the future the way to go would be to have an OWIN startup within DNN Platform and expose a way for extensions to [register in the pipeline|https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Prototype.LiquidContent/blob/DNN-10451-spike-arch/src/Dnn.Module.LiquidContent/Startup.cs#L11]. This is also inevitable path for the prospect of moving to .NET Core eventually"

summary: "Null reference exception happened when the page is redirected in SSLOffload environment"
description: """When a page is setup to redirect to the existing page in SSLOffload environment, null reference exception occurs when the page is typed in from the browser  In this scenario Page2 is setup to redirect to Page3. Please check the attached file for details on configuration.     To reproduce,  1. Setup SSL Settings  2. Setup Page2 to redirect to Page3  3. Request Page2 from a browser (e.g https://dnndev.me/Home/Page2)    After investigation, the exception is from the function   IsSecureConnectionOrSslOffload(HttpRequest request)  where the PortalSettings is null and it was used to get the ActiveTab information.    In our opinion for this scenario, checking the IsSecure of the Active Tab is not related to determining whethere a request is secure or not.    Our suggestion on fixing is as following.      public static bool IsSecureConnectionOrSslOffload(HttpRequest request)          {              if (request.IsSecureConnection)              {                  return true;              }              string ssloffloadheader = HostController.Instance.GetString(""""SSLOffloadHeader"""", """""""");              //if the ssloffloadheader variable has been set check to see if a request header with that type exists              if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ssloffloadheader))              {                  string ssloffload = request.Headers[ssloffloadheader];                  if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ssloffload))                  {                      return true;                  }              }              return false;          }  """

summary: "Password Reset process only partially directs the user about a proper password format"
description: """Example:    - User requests a password reset  - User clicks the link within the password reset email (which then introduces the issue sometimes where the username pre-populates with the incorrect username - different dev item already)  - User starts to key in new password and is informed if the number of characters has not been met, so for example if that is 7 characters, they type 1234567  - User is able to proceed forward  - User is stopped at another screen which once again prompts for their password to be changed, and they receive the """"Your new password was not accepted for security reasons. Please enter a password that you haven't used before and is long and complex enough to meet the site's password complexity requirements."""" HOWEVER, 99.9% of the time on a public site the user will not be privy to watch the password complexity requirements actually are, and this leads to a loop and/or support emails/calls    Can the password reset process be revamped to reduce the number of screens that the user interacts with (to avoid confusion) and can the process be more informative as it relates to password requirements, based on whatever settings have been configured within DNN and the web.config file?"""

summary: "SI: Module Settings - Allow Index Setting"
description: """When a new module is created, the tabmodule settings for the module are not created; therefore, if a user goes into the settings of the module and tries to disable the default allow index option, it will not work, and the POST request would not send any details for the allow index option.    On the other hand, if the user first saves the module settings with the default allow index enabled; then the data is sent on the request and gets added to the database; furthermore, the user can disable it once this is done.    The expected behavior is that a user should be able to disable this option the first time the settings are applied instead of having to enable it first to then disable it."""

summary: "PB Pages - Cannot access Module Settings for non secure Page over HTTPS"
description: """Reproduce steps,  1. enable SSL on the site  2. login as host to the site using HTTPS  3. go to PB > Pages, click on any page not marked as secure from the tree view  4. go to Advanced > Modules tab and click pencil button on any module     Expected result,  module settings loaded properly    Actual results,  module settings not loaded, js error in console log     !image-2017-11-02-15-38-44-195.png|thumbnail! """
comments: "I believe I am seeing this issue on a client site with DNN 9.6.1.  All pages are set to be unsecure in the database, but they have an F5 network security device in place that is enforcing https on the site, so all pages are secure when you browse to them.  When loading the HTML editor or module settings, or any popup contol, the popup content is just a spinning loader graphic.  When you look at the HTML in the browser’s inspector, the iframe URL has http instead of https, so it will not load the settings page do not load due to mixed content security rules.  I can edit the iframe URL in the browser’s inspector and then settings load fine.  I tried setting a page to be secure, but that causes an infinite redirect loop.  It seems like this may be caused by a configuration issue with their F5 device, but if a page is loaded through https, popup iframes should automatically be set to use https as well, so I think there is also a DNN issue.  !https_issue2.PNG|width=1437,height=210!  !https_issue.PNG|width=141

This is due to security trimming where every single search result returned will be looked at from the database and checked for permission. This is very time and CPU intensive process. The solution should be to limit the number of items to check for permission to the page size to display. This will reduce the processing time dramatically." summary: "Journal posts in private groups visible to all users (/w solution)"
description: """A while back someone decided to do a bit of work with Journal API. Presumably to fix the issue with posts appearing for everyone when the Private (selectable option from privacy menu) was used. Thus the SecuritySet parsing function was born PrepareSecuritySet(...). But as it turns out the new implementation broke private group posts by not setting the appropriate security set and thus making posts appear for everyone to see outside of Social Groups module.    I do not know the exact version of DNN Platform that the breaking change was introduced because I am lazy to look it up, but I do know that to this day the GitHub repository still has the same code and thus presumably the bug remains unreported.    Steps to reproduce the issue:    1. Download and install DNN Platform  1.1 DNN 7.1.1 is tested as working  1.2 DNN 7.4.2 is tested as not working  2. Create two pages: Journal Feed and Social Groups  3. Add Journal module to Journal Feed page  4. Add Social Groups module to Social Groups page and hit auto configure button  5. Configure Social Groups module by allowing Registered users to create groups  6. Create 1+ test user (as many as you like)  6.1 user1 - for example, but you can get a little more creative  7. As user1 create a private group and share a couple of posts  8. As (host) user visit Journal Feed page    Expected results:  (host) user (and any other user not a member of the same group) should not be able to see user1 posts    Actual result:  (host) user can see user1 posts    OK, by definition (host) user should be able to see everything but in this case, we're not concerned with Journal posts so feel free to sub (host) user for any regular user (user2, user3 - be creative) who is not a member of user1 group.      The following block of code dealing with setting appropriate security set for the private group posts before the breaking change:    {{        if (journalItem.SocialGroupId > 0)        {              JournalItem item = journalItem;              RoleInfo role = TestableRoleController.Instance.GetRole(journalItem.PortalId, r => r.SecurityMode != SecurityMode.SecurityRole && r.RoleID == item.SocialGroupId);              if (role != null)              {                    if (currentUser.IsInRole(role.RoleName))                    {                          journalItem.SecuritySet += """"R"""" + journalItem.SocialGroupId.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) + """","""";                          if (!role.IsPublic)                          {                                journalItem.SecuritySet = journalItem.SecuritySet.Replace(""""E,"""", String.Empty);                          }                    }              }        }  }}    Part of which looks like it was replaced with:    {{        ...        else if (journalItem.SecuritySet == """"R,"""")        {            if (journalItem.SocialGroupId > 0)                journalItem.SecuritySet += """"R"""" + journalItem.SocialGroupId + """","""";        }  }}    And the bulk of the logic was modified to take the following form:    {{        if (journalItem.SocialGroupId > 0 && originalSecuritySet.Contains(""""U,""""))        {            var item = journalItem;            var role = RoleController.Instance.GetRole(journalItem.PortalId,                r => r.SecurityMode != SecurityMode.SecurityRole && r.RoleID == item.SocialGroupId);              if (role != null && !role.IsPublic)            {                journalItem.SecuritySet = journalItem.SecuritySet.Replace(""""E,"""", String.Empty).Replace(""""C,"""", String.Empty);            }        }  }}    And see two lines of code that indicate to the issue:          1. else if (journalItem.SecuritySet == """"R,"""")        2. if (journalItem.SocialGroupId > 0 && originalSecuritySet.Contains(""""U,""""))    I failed to find code reference where the condition to meet (1) is getting set.  I think the solution failed to consider that (originalSecuritySet.Contains(""""U,"""")) is only available outside Social Groups module [~\DesktopModules\Journal\View.ascx].    Of course, replacing existing solution with original is not going to fix the problem that the change was supposed to fix. summary: "Move Liquid Content from Microservice to Platform"
description: """We want to move Liquid Content from the Evoq Microservice into modules and extensions within DNN Platform.      Important items to consider:  # Content Library, Content Types, Visualizers and API Keys need to be ported.    # Visualizer module needs to be ported.    # Search Integration  # Database structure/storage     Features not being migrated:  # Content Library -> Facebook, Twitter and LinkedIn Publishing      *Engineering Considerations*  # We need to have proper separation of concerns between web API, business layer and repository layers  # Where possible we should .Net Standard 2.0 class libraries  # Where possible remove dependencies of DNN Dlls  # Must support DNN's native:  ## Permission  ## Localization  ## Workflow   ## Search  # The above systems should be integrated using Dependency Injection  # Must use SQL Server for data storage, but the repository layer should be abstractable, where other data storage (e.g. MongoDB) can be used. Current Liquid Content uses DocumentDB which is Azure only service  ## We may require newer version of SQL Server, e.g. 2016 (especially if we want to take advantage of Json data types)   # Have source code in a new repository outside of Dnn.Platform. Our goal is to keep things as decoupled as possible - continue to slim down Platform, and certainly not more.  ## This should be Library type extension.   ## In theory, one could choose not to install Structured Content on DNN.  ## Any module taking advantage of SC must specify dependency on this library.  # Should be scalable, must support 1M+ content items with ease (of course depends on hardware). Solution should linearly scale with more hardware resources.     """
comments: "Is there a roadmap?  When can we expect this functionality in the DNN Platform?    Great news!!!" [SEP] "Hi [~accountid:<USER>, this will be a pretty large project.  We don't have a specific date just yet, but right now we are tracking towards March 2018.  "

summary: "Platform source code identified issues - OO Language Requirements"
description: """h2. CA2217: Do not mark enums with FlagsAttribute  The issue """"CA2217: Do not mark enums with FlagsAttribute"""" is a broad issue that does not pertain to a single source code file.    h3. Cause  An externally visible enumeration is marked with FlagsAttribute and it has one or more values that are not powers of two or a combination of the other defined values on the enumeration.    h3. Rule Description  An enumeration should have FlagsAttribute present only if each value defined in the enumeration is a power of two, or a combination of defined values.    h3. How to Fix Violations  To fix a violation of this rule, remove FlagsAttribute from the enumeration.    h3. When to Suppress Warnings  Do not suppress a warning from this rule.    h3. MSDN Documentation  http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/ms182335.aspx      h2. CA1050: Declare types in namespaces  The issue """"CA1050: Declare types in namespaces"""" is a broad issue that does not pertain to a single source code file.    h3. Cause  A public or protected type is defined outside the scope of a named namespace.    h3. Rule Description  Types are declared in namespaces to prevent name collisions, and as a way to organize related types in an object hierarchy. Types that are outside any named namespace are in a global namespace that cannot be referenced in code.    h3. How to Fix Violations  To fix a violation of this rule, place the type in a namespace.    h3. When to Suppress Warnings  Although you never have to suppress a warning from this rule, it is safe to do this when the assembly will never be used together with other assemblies.    h3. MSDN Documentation  http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/ms182134.aspx"""
comments: "@kanma, please review the following PR: https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1911    There is only one place which I found the *CA2217* issue in the DNN source code (file  {{DNN Platform\Library\Services\Social\Messaging\Frequency.cs}}).  All other places are in third party source code (e.g., log4.net) used in the Platform.    As for *CA1050* I think it is not possible to do so as this will break the compatibility in third party modules developers. This will be left without fixes.      For QA testers: this is a development task and no QA is needed." [SEP] "Looks good, PR merged in platform build# 9.2.0.202-449." [SEP] "Closing this JIRA as dev task (without any QA effort)  "

summary: "Foreign Key restraints missing/lacking on PortalLocalization table"
description: """When navigating via persona bar to Site Settings > Site Behavior > Default Pages, I'd receive an error message with a red background stating to check my internet connection. The issue is, I deleted the default search page from pages, and emptied my recycle bin. There is no FK restraint in the PortalLocalization table which references the TabId's for the default pages. I'd think there should be, and this should be set to default to NULL when a referenced tab is deleted.     The error was thrown in Dnn.PersonaBar.SiteSettings (SiteSettingsController.cs) GetDefaultPagesSettings(). The response attempts to retrieve the TabName but threw an error because the TabInfo object was null.    Temporary resolution is to simply go into the database and set it to NULL manually. If for some reason a FK should not be introduced (not sure why) can we at least disable the ability to delete a tab that is referenced as a default page? Similar to how this is done with the Home page?       !22549564_942275212577992_7107695571350270487_n.jpg|thumbnail! """
comments: "We should not link bank from PortalLocalization table to Tabs, as PortalLocalization is referencing Portals table as well as Tabs table does. There should be a cleanup in UpdateTabs and UpdateTabLocalization stored procedures to ensure the referenced tab does exist.    A better implementation would be creating a ""PortalSpecialTabs"" table with Key PortalID - CutureCode -SpecialName and an required TabID, which should reference both, PortalLocalization and Tabs table, using cascading FK.  "

summary: "Browser language detection"
description: """The """"Enable Browser Language Detection"""" option under languages after setting up a site with multiple languages doesn't have any effect on how the site handles language detection.    To re-create:  Have a DNN site with setup in one language, e.g. English.  Setup second language, e.g. Spanish, setting up a localized version of each page, and enabling """"Browser Language Detection""""  Configure browser to use second language as default language. Test using other sites to check browser correctly configured, e.g. google.  Attempt to navigate to DNN site (without any language parameters in URL) using browser configured for the second language. Site will default to first language.  """
comments: "did you clear browser cookies?   Preferred language for a site is stored in a cookie.  Also, registered users will always get preferred language from their DNN user profile." summary: "Rendering profile pictures through dnnimage handler in DNN 8.0.4 is not working in IE 11"
description: """Rendering profile pictures through dnnimage handler in DNN 8.0.4 is not working in IE 11 but I think this is already an issue for a long time. If X-Content-Type-Options nosniff i set profile picture always fail in IE 11. In Dutch the message is """"Kan de afbeelding op de URL https://wwww.server-essentials.com/nl/DnnImageHandler.ashx… niet decoderen."""" I could remove X-Content-Type-Options nosniff but I rather do not. Is there a better solution? In https://drupal.stackexchange.com/…/some-images-are-not-disp… the answer is to check Mime Type settings and I have done that and it seems all OK...    I found that any image is loaded as jpeg according to Fiddler (image/jpeg). But the no_avatar.gif image is obiously a gif image but DnnImageHandler loads it as a jpeg image and THAT causes a mismatch in X-Content-Type-Options and the image fails to load...what now?"""

summary: "Enter key not working in Account Login module"
description: """Trying to login from a dedicated Login page with the Account Login module in it, fails to postback if hitting enter key while works fine when clicking the Login button with the mouse.  This is not happening if login page is not set in the Site settings behaviour page (that is the DNN default login page is automatically created).    The reasons for this bug are:  1. a typo error in the javascript contained in DesktopModules\AutheticationServices\DNN\Login.ascx where <%#ModuleId > Null.NullInteger ? ModuleId.ToString() : """"""""%> should be <%=ModuleId > Null.NullInteger ? ModuleId.ToString() : """"""""%>  2. in the same code, if partial rendering is occurring, the keydown function associated to controls with class dnnLoginService should be set not only on %(document).ready but also when postback ends in Sys.WebForms.PageRequestManager.getInstance().add_endRequest    In addition, this module claims the missing of dnn.controls.js.    The ammended code should look like this:    <script type=""""text/javascript"""" src=""""/js/dnn.controls.js""""></script>  <script type=""""text/javascript"""">   /*globals jQuery, window, Sys */   (function ($, Sys) {    function setUpLogin() {     var actionLinks = $(""""a#dnn_ctr<%=ModuleId > Null.NullInteger ? ModuleId.ToString() : """"""""%>_Login_Login_DNN_cmdLogin"""");     actionLinks.click(function () {      if ($(this).hasClass(""""dnnDisabledAction"""")) {       return false;      }        actionLinks.addClass(""""dnnDisabledAction"""");     });    }        function setUpKeydown() {        $('.dnnLoginService').on('keydown', function (e) {      if ($(e.target).is('input:text,input:password') && e.keyCode === 13) {       var $loginButton = $('#dnn_ctr<%=ModuleId > Null.NullInteger ? ModuleId.ToString() : """"""""%>_Login_Login_DNN_cmdLogin');       if ($loginButton.hasClass(""""dnnDisabledAction"""")) {        return false;       }         $loginButton.addClass(""""dnnDisabledAction"""");       eval($loginButton.attr('href'));       e.preventDefault();       return false;      }     });    }      $(document).ready(function () {     setUpKeydown();        setUpLogin();          Sys.WebForms.PageRequestManager.getInstance().add_endRequest(function () {      setUpKeydown();      setUpLogin();     });    });   }(jQuery, window.Sys));  </script>      """

summary: "Not able to un-check the ""Published"" check box for localized pages"
description: """When a site is localized you can go to the page settings of any page, go to """"Localization"""" tab. Then you will be able to see the default language for that page plus the localized version of the same page.    There is a """"Published"""" checkbox which by default the first time you localize a page is is unchecked.    Then you can check once you are ready to publish the localized version.    However if you no longer want the localized version to be published, when you try to un-check the """"Published"""" checkbox and save it, it goes back to check. So we cannot unpublish a localized page once it has been published.    Not sure if this is the desired behavior or it is a bug, but I decided to report.    Steps to reproduce:    1 - Activate a second language on DNN 9.1.1  2 - Go to the home page;  3 - Go to the page settings;  4 - Go to the """"Localization"""" tab of the home page;  5 - Check if you see the default language and the second localized language;  6 - If not click """"Make Page Translatable""""  7 - Click the checkbox where it says """"Published"""" under the localized version of the page;  8 - Click """"Update Localization"""" to save;  9 - Now click again """"Published"""" under the localized version of the page to un-check it;  10 - Click """"Update Localization"""" to save;  11 - Behaviour: """"Published"""" gets checked again  12 - Expected behavior: """"Published"""" checkbox would become unchecked  """

summary: "Browser autofill feature interrupts the password reset link/query string"
description: """Hi, we noticed today that with the Password Reset link emails/links that the Username: field on the DNN Login module can be changed on the fly by the end user's browser, thus having the username change to something other than what the link is tied to.  For instance, they click the link which is tied to DNN username 'test', but when the Login page loads to complete the password reset process, a stored value from the browser changes the value to say 'test1'.  This leads to a confusing message the password cannot be changed due to security restrictions, and that the password reset is no longer valid (leaving the user stuck unless they refresh the page and realize that they can actually try again)."""
comments: "AFAIK this is an older issue, which already exists in DNN 7.4 and 8.  We are getting a number of complaints about it.  Workaround: users need to close the browser prior to clicking the link in the email.  " [SEP] "DNN-10291: Browser autofill feature interrupts the password reset link/query string  - Disabling the username text box not allowing browser anymore to change the username or email    PR is   https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1944" [SEP] "Change looks good, PR merged in platform build# 9.2.0.249." [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER>.zubair] Please share the steps to reproduce this issue" [SEP] "Please do use two browsers (i.e browser1:b1 & browser2:b2)  and register users namely test  from  b1 & test1 from b2 browsers. Generate password reset link from b1 for test. And grab that link and open it in b2, then in text box you could have a chance to have test1 instead of test, then proceeding with wrong name for password reset process you can stuck in the situation mentioned by report. summary: "SI: Editor Permissions Broken After Security Patch"
description: """After installing the September Security patch the way that the editor loads custom configurations based on roles has changed.     when starting the RadEditor, it opens ConfigFile/ConfigFile.RoleId.#.xml and ToolsFile/ToolsFile.RoleId.#.xml in DesktopModules/Admin/RadEditorProvider, where # is the role id of a group the user belongs to. Before the patch, this was the id of the group with the most rights, but now it's just the group with the lowest id. In result, editor behavior for various users has changed whereas other users can not gain special configurations thanks to their membership in groups with lower ids (but less rights)."""

summary: "Separate security checks fro SA & PB security in a common DLL"
description: """Currently there are two components that check for security issues in a DNN site. These are:  - the stand alone Security Analyzer  - the Persona Bar security extension    When issuing a security fix and updating one but not the other, there could be some confusion created for the customers where one of these checkers says an issue is fixed while the other says it is not.    To avoid this situation, we need to create a common DLL for the checks that can be used by both and any update in this library will be reflected in both of them. Also we need to modify both components mentioned above to rely on the common DLL to report any security issue.  """

summary: "DNN 9 Site/Portal level SMTP Settings Fail"
description: """The Site/Portal Level SMTP settings have been broken a long time in DNN.  Perhaps there is a workaround that I am not aware of, but for those of us that use multiple portals this is a real problem.  If someone has a workaround I would appreciate hearing about it.  Below I have listed the current behavior along with the desired behavior:.    +Current Behavior:+   * I had a Global SMTP provider configured.    * I changed the SMTP Server Mode to <MySiteName>  * I put in the correct settings for the site specific email.and clicked Save  * I then clicked the Test SMTP Settings button  * This resulted in a successful send from the Global email instead of the Site Level email.  * I Removed the Global SMTP Settings, saved the settings.  * I changed the SMTP Server Mode back to  <MySiteName, saved and retested..  * Even though I removed the Global SMTP Settings, it was still successfully sending email using these settings.    +Desired Behavior:+  * Sites without Site/Portal SMTP settings configured should use the Global SMTP settings.  * Site/Portal SMTP settings should override Global settings.  * These settings would be transparent so that when modules (without special SMTP provisions) send email, the email would be sent using the configured choice.   .  This would be a very useful feature to enable / complete.  Thanks You!   """
comments: "These settings with Basic options are working fine. And can be switched between Global & <My Website Name>" [SEP] "Closing this ticket as CNR"

summary: "SI: Cannot choose themes while Evoq is deployed as an application (Virtual Directory)"
description: """Noticed in Content 9.1.1 or any upgrades to 9.1.1    This may be the way how the application changed how it handles host and portal level themes. When you have Evoq deployed as an application and upgrade to 9.1.1, you will lose access to changing the themes, layouts, and containers.  This will also occur on base 9.1.1 installation    !2017-09-08_0941.png|width=800!    Steps to reproduce:   1. Go to IIS > Create a website > Point the physical path to a parent folder  2. Add Application > Create an alias > Point the physical path to the subfolder  3. Put Content 9.1.1 install files into subfolder > Install the site.  4. Click Manage > Themes    Expected Result:  See all the themes, layouts, containers currently installed on the site.    Actual Result:  Themes are visible but layouts and containers are not.    !skin.png|width=900!    The request:  */API/PersonaBar/Themes/GetCurrentTheme?language=en-US*  returns  {""""SiteLayout"""":null,""""SiteContainer"""":null,""""EditLayout"""":null,""""EditContainer"""":null}    Console error:  Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property 'themeName' of null      at t.value (eval at globalEval (jquery.js?cdv=96:2), <anonymous>:2:4904)      at t.value (eval at globalEval (jquery.js?cdv=96:2), <anonymous>:2:4750)      at m.performInitialMount (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:129)      at mountComponent (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:129)      at Object.mountComponent (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:130)      at m.performInitialMount (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:129)      at mountComponent (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:129)      at Object.mountComponent (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:130)      at Object.updateChildren (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:128)      at Y._reconcilerUpdateChildren (export-bundle.js?cdv=96:130)    *WORKAROUND:*  The site will be looking for themes at level 1 which is the site level  Moving skin and container files in portal folders like Portals/0/Skins folder and Portals/0/Containers folder. After doing so, the site can locate the container and layout files.  """
comments: "The problem is on the method GetThemeLevel in ThemesController.  I've noticed that sometimes the parameter themeFilePath is something like [G]/skins/... and sometimes is the relative path /portals/skins/...  On the later case the condition fails and the method return ThemeLeve.Site always.    To fix this I've changed ThemeInfo class so that Level is not a calculated property, instead is:          [DataMember(Name = ""level"")]          public ThemeLevel Level { get; set; }    Then on the GetLayouts and GetContainers methods, on each call to GetThemes I pass as the last parameter the Level we are processing:    public IList<ThemeInfo> GetLayouts(PortalSettings portalSettings, ThemeLevel level)          {              var themes = new List<ThemeInfo>();              if ((level & ThemeLevel.Site) == ThemeLevel.Site)              {                  themes.AddRange(GetThemes(ThemeType.Skin, Path.Combine(portalSettings.HomeDirectoryMapPath, SkinController.RootSkin), ThemeLevel.Site));              }

summary: "Upgrades broken: System.IO.FileLoadException: Could not load file or assembly 'Newtonsoft.Json, Version=6.0.0.0'"
description: """Upgrade Platform/Basic/Content/Engage from any previous release    For Platform and Basic, Persona Bar is not displayed  For Content and Engage, yellow screen of death is displayed.         !PBmissing.png|thumbnail!      !Newtonsoft.jpg|thumbnail! """
comments: "There are several different values of newtonsoft binding info in web.config between products, as i installed 9.1.1 and info as below:  platform: oldVersion=""0.0.0.0-7.0.0.0""  basic: oldVersion=""0.0.0.0-7.0.0.0""  content: oldVersion=""0.0.0.0-32767.32767.32767.32767""  engage: oldVersion=""0.0.0.0-7.32767.32767.32767""    so the major problem comes from Content, the old version included all versions, so we can't put newtonsoft assembly in upgrade package directly. so what i do for this item:  1. included newtonsoft.json assembly in a separate install package;  2. remove newtonsoft.json.dll from all upgrade packages;  3. change all oldVersion to ""0.0.0.0-32767.32767.32767.32767"" before start upgrade process.  4. remove the assembly info in database which has no package id before.    QA need cover below scenarios at least:  1. platform, basic, content, engage refresh install;  2. platform 9.1.1 -> 9.2.0; 8.0.0 -> 9.2.0;  3. basic 9.1.1 -> 9.2.0; 8.5.0 -> 9.2.0;  4. content 9.1.1 -> 9.2.0; 8.5.0 -> 9.2.0;

Please login again.""""    Currently, the user will be redirected back to login page.   """

summary: "SI: If the DB Server Restarts, DNN site goes down until Apppool Restart"
description: """If a DB Server restart or gets shut down for a little time, DNN will start timing out which is expected; nevertheless, once the DB Server is backup DNN/IIS would still use the old connection pool and would keep timing out until the application pool is restarted which restarts the connection to the DB.    The enhancement request is for DNN to have a way of checking if the DB instance is still present, or to otherwise force an AppPool restart."""

summary: "SI: Use different values instead of using core IIS settings in config"
description: """Brief Description of Issue:  Use unique values instead of touching core IIS settings, for the DNN config related values. With this users can make IIS settings as per their requirements and it will be easy to manage on our end.    So for example:    Instead of using the httpRuntime tag:      <httpRuntime shutdownTimeout=""""120"""" executionTimeout=""""900"""" useFullyQualifiedRedirectUrl=""""true"""" maxRequestLength=""""29296"""" requestLengthDiskThreshold=""""81920"""" requestPathInvalidCharacters=""""<,>,*,%,:,\,?"""" enableVersionHeader=""""false"""" requestValidationMode=""""2.0"""" fcnMode=""""Single"""" />    Or:      <security>        <requestFiltering>          <requestLimits maxAllowedContentLength=""""512000"""" />                    </requestFiltering>      </security>    maxRequestLength=""""512000""""    Use unique values instead.      """
comments: "This is the first time in years with the application that this request has been made. At this time, we have no intention of making this enhancement happening within the next year (plus) of time, so closing it out. "

summary: "SqlDataProvider.ExecuteSQL() does not close connections; exhausts pool"
description: """We've recently upgraded our site to DNN 9, and we've been facing an issue where after accessing a particular custom-built module, the site becomes unresponsive and returns the following error on _all_ requests:    {{Unhandled Error  Error Details  File   Error   Timeout expired. The timeout period elapsed prior to obtaining a connection from the pool. This may have occurred because all pooled connections were in use and max pool size was reached.}}    I've traced the issue to a line in our module's code that uses {{DataProvider.ExecuteSQL}}, like so:    {{DotNetNuke.Data.DataProvider.Instance.ExecuteSQL(sql)}}    After reviewing the DNN source code, I can see that this API no longer properly disposes the connection it creates. The offending code is here:    https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/blob/353e0649346784996f49880069316dcdf91ab864/DNN%20Platform/Library/Data/SqlDataProvider.cs#L183-L185    The issue was introduced in [commit 5848e75c4f283eeb280ff10bfb583bda648c7dbf|https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/commit/5848e75c4f283eeb280ff10bfb583bda648c7dbf] by @george.alatrash on Jan 9, 2017.    If necessary, I can provide a sample module that demonstrates the issue, but I think the issue is evident by glancing at the code."""
comments: "[~accountid:<USER>,    The method must not close the connection; otherwise, how will you be able to use the returned {{IDataReader}}? The method works fine as is and it been tested thoroughly. It will be great if you supply a sample test module to help in diagnosing this issue." [SEP] "Hi [~accountid:<USER>,    Thanks for taking a look at this, and sorry for not being totally clear. You're right, the connection cannot be disposed in the method itself -- but the problem here is that the connection is not closed even when the reader is closed, and it used to be, before the change I referenced.    It stems from the way {{Microsoft.ApplicationBlocks.Data.SqlHelper}} is now called, which controls how the DataReader is created.    *Before* your change, the code called {{SqlHelper.ExecuteReader(connectionString, CommandType.Text, sql)}}. I decompiled {{SqlHelper}} (I cannot find any official documentation for it...) to find that inside the overloads that take a connection _string_ (as opposed to a connection itself

summary: "SI: Shared Modules Error When Localized"
description: """When you have a site that is localized you can have modules shared across the localized versions by selecting the display on all pages option. This allows you to have language specific modules shared across all pages on the specific language. If you have a page that is created in one language and then later add the missing languages it does not receive the module that is meant to be shared on it.    Steps to reproduce:    1. Create a site that is localized (this example I use en-us and da-dk)  2. Create a new module on the en-us home page add in some unique content   3. Share this module across all pages   4. Create a new module on the da-dk home page add in some unique content  5. Share this module across all pages  6. Create a new page on the en-us site   7. Add the missing languages for the page by going through the settings  8. the page that is created in the da-dk site will have the module that is shared onto the en-us site and not the module that is shared across the da-dk site     There is also a added error afterward in that the module that any pages created in the da-dk language will then receive the shared module from the en-us site.    Expected Result:  the new page should only have the module which shared across the same culture. such as da-dk page should only contains the module in da-dk culture."""

summary: "Eliminate use of $(window).load(function); calls"
description: """In order to upgrade DNN to a more current version of jQuery, we need to remove our use of deprecated code.  One of the areas that has been changed is the $.fn.load method.  In prior versions of jQuery it had two different signatures: one that accepted a function and was used for binding to the window 'load' event, and a section signature that was used as a shortcut to the ajax get method.  The window 'load' event form has been removed in jQuery 3 and all $(window).load(function () {}) calls should be replaced with $(window).on('load', function(){}) event binding calls instead.    This functionality is located in ModuleActions.ascx on line 140, but may also exist in other places in the platform."""

summary: "SI: Encrypted web.config sections"
description: """When encrypting sections on a site, the following work as expected:    * Encrypting the connectionStrings section works without issues  * Encrypting the appSettings sections works.  * Encrypting a core section such as system.webServer would throw errors.    However, when installing modules or upgrades that would require to modify or add entries to certain sections then it will throw errors if the section is encrypted, and one would need to decrypt the file before applying these changes.    The suggestion in this case is that DNN should check for encrypted sections before installing/upgrading so that it can notify the user (ask for the section to be decrypted). Or to handle the case and decrypt the section, add/modify the entry, and encrypting it back."""

summary: "Possibility to reinstate DNN8 View layout and Pane postions"
description: """This is really a list of features that have been removed in DNN9 and I think they are a backwards step.  1. No view layout mode.  this was good because you could visualize the panes  in a skin and then demonstrate to non techy users exactly where they should place new content .Also  a quick way to see where page modules are positioned.    2.The removal of pane names in edit mode is not helpful to non technical administrators, they now have no real idea where they should drag and drop a new module.      As all the panes are collapsed with no descriptions???   trying to figure what pane or row of panes an existing module is using is tricky to say the least, for example it is not obvious whether the pane you choose is right/left narrow or left/right wide or which row it belongs too.    3. When adding a new module I can no longer specify the correct pane in advance. I have to place it then right click to choose a pane. Ok,  in theory but I refer to the previous question.    4. If I bring in an existing module from another page it totally screws up the positions of other modules on the page and I have to reset them all again (at least it does on my package).    I  have to write a training module for our 200+ """"non technical"""" editors and the section on how to add new modules to a specified particular pane is going to be a pain in the *@#%.  And copying an existing module is likely to be very confusing, even too much to get their heads around.    One of the selling points for DNN for me is its really easy interface, I appreciate that liquid content is the way forward, but many orgs like mine (local government)   where we have lots of editors who's only digital experience is word or excel, so the lack of easy to visualize placement is detrimental """

summary: "SI: Role Messages not behaving as expected."
description: """To reproduce:    1) Put users A, B, and C in the same role.  2) Have User A send a message to the role. This will put the message in the inboxes of both B and C.  3) Have B reply to A.  4) Have C then view the message in his/her inbox. C will see a """"Show Previous Replies"""" box above A's message (see attached screenshot).    This is caused due to the message thread having 2 messages and user C only being able to see one.    In /Modules/CoreMessaging/Scripts/CoreMessaging.js. The code is  self.showPreviousRepliesVisible = ko.computed(function () {   return self.messagethreads().length < self.TotalThreads();   });    Is the expected behavior in this case for C to be able the view the entire thread, or should the response from B to the message from A be treated as a separate message thread?"""

summary: "Redirect_AfterLogin setting is no longer useful"
description: """Hello DNN experts,    I wanted to share some of my findings and see if I am right.    So I have a dnn website which has a requirement to redirect to specific page after login.  The website used to run on dnn 6 and redirection was behaving perfectly fine.  I have updated the website to dnn 9.1.1 recently and redirection is no longer working properly.    It works only if:  1.open browser and type in website root url and do not browse anywhere in the site  2.click login (returnurl query string is blank)  3. fill in username and password and click login  4. user gets redirected where it suppose to.    It does not work if:  1.open browser and type in website root url and  browse anywhere in the site.  2.click login  (returnurl query string is populated with the url of previous page)  3. fill in username and password and click login  4. user gets redirected where it was previously (It should redirect to the """"Redirect_AfterLogin"""" set in the portalsettings)    I thought that something is wrong with my dnn configuration but could not find what is wrong.  Then started to browse git dnn source code and I saw some changes in this area.    Please see the code [before change|https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2F6xp3Xz79XVlBXRGtkdGFxbEk/view?usp=sharing] and [after change|https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B2F6xp3Xz79XLVc1OWwycEtPbFU/view?usp=sharing].    So based on that code analysis I believe that in dnn 7.5 > """"Redirect_AfterLogin"""" setting kicks off only when returnurl query string is blank    otherwise it redirects you to returnurl query string parameter.    I would say this is a bug. DNN never behaved like that       Thanks    Tadas"""

summary: "Portal / Host Theme Selector"
description: """Per DNN-10059, we now allow users to upload portal-specific themes to the site, but we still don't differentiate on which themes are portal-specific or global.    This story is to introduce a UI update into Themes which will differentiate global vs. portal themes.    ***********  Design Notes:  1. Add headings for """"GLOBAL THEMES"""" and """"SITE THEMES"""" as shown in the mockup, with a line separator as shown.    2. Add a dropdown filter, visible to both Host and Admin users. By default it should show All Themes, but they can choose to view Global Themes or Site Themes. Site owners (admins) should see all global themes and the portal-specific themes for only their portal. If either Global-only or Portal-only themes are selected to be displayed: the label, themes, and line separator are hidden, and should only see that section header.    3. One other clean up item on this page:  In the implementation, of the Selected Theme Panel at the top, it is the wrong color.  It should be WHITE #FFFFFF, but it is currently showing up as ALABASTER"""
comments: "I still vote for a bigger change: keep all skins and containers in a central place like modules (you could still use /portals/_default/skin and /portals/_default/container). Like for modules, use a database table to restrict availability to specific portals within the application. This would be more consistent and easier to handle - and superusers may provide same skin to a couple of sites (but not all), without being forced to copy the source files.    There is a challenge to implement the upgrade, i.e. copying the portal skins and containers to the central location (using skinname-[portalid]) and adding the skins to new portalskins table." summary: "User Authorized Email Notifications are Not Sent"
description: """Hi,    The issue is that after users are registering through the Action Forms module we configured, the user account is waiting for the admin’s authorization.  Once the admin is authorizing the user account, an email should be sent out from the system to inform the user of the approval. This email is not sent. The emails from the Action Forms module are sent just fine and other system emails are also sent fine (pass reset, new security role etc..).    Managed, our hosting provider have tried to troubleshoot it two times with no luck. They changed the emails to conform with the server’s spam filter and they have set up a new DNN v. 09.01.01 (129) platform and were able to reproduce this issue and eliminated the possibility that a 3rd party module/configuration is causing this issue. They have also told me that there are not any records in the server’s logs of these emails trying to be sent.    Managed conclusion is that there is an issue with the DNN 9 platform that causing this problem.     Steps to reproduce:    1. User registers to the private registration website    2. Admin is approving the registration by going to Manage > Users > Unauthorized >   Authorize User.    3. E-mail notification should be sent out to inform the user of the approval - no e-mail notification is sent out.    How can we solve this issue? Is there any workaround in case there aren't any solutions?  Thanks,"""

summary: "Cannot send messages if Newtonsoft.Json is upgraded"
description: """If the Newtonsoft.Json dependency is updated (you could install [^newtonsoft.json.8.0.3.zip] or [^newtonsoft.json.10.0.3.zip], or a 3rd party module which requires a newer version), there's an error when trying to send a message:    !2017-07-18_15-37-29.png|thumbnail, alt=An error occurred while creating the message:Object reference not set to an instance of an object.!     This issue stems from the JavaScript for the Compose Message component sending an unexpected JSON structure to the MessagingController web API (specifically, the API is expecting strings, the component sends empty objects).  In Newtonsoft.Json v7, this results in those fields being {{null}}, while after version 7 (versions 8-10), this results in a failure to complete the model binding, so the whole DTO is {{null}}."""
comments: "A fix for this issue has been supplied in [PR #1805|https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1805]" [SEP] "Thanks <USER>- this has been triaged and is in the backlog. summary: "Extension install can overwrite newer assembly with older version"
description: """When upgrading a package (i.e. installing a new version of an existing package), or doing a repair install, it is possible for an assembly in that package to overwrite a newer version of an existing assembly (e.g an assembly which was installed via a different package).    h2. Steps to Reproduce  * Install [^PackageOne_4.1.0.zip] (which references HtmlTags.dll version 4.1.0)  * Install [^PackageTwo_4.2.0.zip] (which references HtmlTags.dll version 4.2.0)  * Put one of the modules on a page (both modules do the same thing), the message should say that version 4.2.0 is installed  * Re-install [^PackageOne_4.1.0.zip] (i.e. do a repair install)    h3. Expected Results  * HtmlTags 4.2.0 is still the referenced assembly    h3. Actual Results  * HtmlTags 4.1.0 is the referenced assembly    Note that this bug is non-deterministic, so it's possible that this scenario wouldn't trigger the bug, but I think it's probable that this will fall into the bug condition."""

summary: "Allow Module to bump cdv version"
description: """We recently ran into a problem where specific module have to create its own version of cdv concept to force a client side refresh of any css and js after upgrading.    In this proposal we should study how to resolve this issue at platform level with the following possible approaches:  # add a new tag in the module manifest a new flag to force cdv increment after module upgrade  ## pro: we reuse the same cdv mechanism provided in the platform  ## cons: we are refreshing the entire static assets cache of the site just for a specific module  NOTE: we should ensure adding a new tag in the manifest will be backward compatible if module vendor want to allow its module to install in previous platform version. In those the tag will be just ingnored.  # consider the creation of a new mechanism at module level (i.e. mcdv) provided by the platform that will automatically append this new parameter and force specific module assets client cache invalidation  ## pro: we will refresh only the module specific assets (not the entire site)  ## cons: if modules are using the same js/css we are forcing the client to down it twice    We will need to consider the two solutions."""

summary: "Remove deprecated methods from source code"
description: """The source of DNN contains many deprecated methods going back to DNN 5.0. These add to the code bloat and DLL size which results in larger memory footprint of the application. Also, these may be utilized in some security hacks. These should be removed as for all those deprecated before release 8.0.0    Not: to look for these in the source code, use normal search and look for  -  *{{[Obsolete(""""Deprecated}}* in all files, or  - *{{\[Obsolete\(\"""".*deprecated}}* as a RegEx to find more items.    I found 689 deprecated entries in the Platform source code at the moment I created this issue."""

summary: "PB Pages: Custom Roles Cannot Add Pages"
description: """When assigning page permissions to a custom role without """"Manage Settings"""" permission in Evoq (Edit in Platform), the pages cannot be properly managed or added for the custom role users (and no feedback is displayed to the end user).     In the end, 2 things should happen:  - The user should NOT see the gear icon in the edit bar unless they have the """"Manage"""" permission in Evoq or """"Edit"""" permissions in Platform of the page currently being viewed  -- When the gear is displayed and clicked, it should continue to load the details of the current page into the persona bar section (it will also show the entire treeview of pages here too)  - The user should be able to """"Add Page"""" when navigating to Persona Bar's Content -> Pages section (if they have the """"Add"""" permissions)    Steps to reproduce:  - Create a user & a custom role and assign this user to the custom role (I used """"Custom"""" as the names)  - Give the role permissions to: View, Add, Add Content, Navigate permissions on a page  - Go to Manage -> Extensions and grant that role deploy permissions for a few modules (I Used HTML Pro & Visualizer modules)  - Login as that user  - Put page into edit mode  - Click """"Settings"""" gear  - Click """"Add Page""""    """

summary: "Pages: Search Results"
description: """This UI is seen when a user types in at least 3 characters into the search area of pages or when they click the search icon within pages header area. When the search results view (the list of items) is displayed, the """"Add Page"""" button should be disabled and the header area in the persona bar needs to say """"Page Search Results"""" as the header and the breadcrumb will be available (and selected where the user previously was before viewing search results). The back to page will also take the end user back to where they were (prior to searching).     User's can filter their results down further by selecting additional filters. When applied, these will be shown at the top of the results lists in a tag like UI fashion. This will allow users to delete a specific filter and have the results immediately updated (when clearing a filter, always go back to page 1).     When results are displayed, a thumbnail (in Evoq only) will be displayed that shows a larger version seen when user's hover on the smaller thumbnail. If a specific page is clicked, it's page settings will be opened in the page management area of the persona bar (so switch from search results to the page details).     Search Filters:  - Page Type (drop down)  -- URL, File, Page  - Publish Status (drop down)  -- Published, Draft  - Published Range (start/end dates; date picker w/ no time)  - Tags (multi-line textbox that can be comma or semicolon separated)    Evoq vs Platform:  - All search fields will be available in both products but in Platform the published status field would only have 1  - In Platform, the thumbnail (which also exposes a larger view) won't be available and items will 'slide' to the left  - Workflow field (in search results per item) will be hidden in Platform   - In Platform, the last published date will be the last modified date, in Evoq this date will be the last published version's last modified date    Notes:  - Once the search results screen is displayed, a user must click """"Back to Page"""" to get back to where they were  -- Deleting input characters does *NOT* take them back  - On the search results screen, the following actions can be taken (see mockup for hover state on a search result):  -- Clicking on the Name of the Search Result opens that Page's Settings (and the tree and other disabled elements are re-activated)  -- The blue text in fields below (page type, publish status, workflow, tags) are clickable as well, and clicking on one of them ADDS that search filter to the list of filters above. If that filter has already been applied, it does nothing.  -- Notice that on hover, top right there are three other icons, these allow the user to jump to other relevant pages: the eye icon opens that page, the pencil icon opens the page to EDIT MODE, and the chart icon opens to the Page Analytics for that page"""

summary: "Pages: Treeview"
description: """A new treeview needs to be created as part of the pages area within the persona bar. This area will be on the left side and always on display within the pages are of the persona bar. Users will be able to see all pages (no permissions check) in the tree view list. When initially loaded by directly clicking the """"Pages"""" menu item in the persona bar, the tree will only load the top level pages and nothing will be expanded. There is an 'expand all'/'collapse all' item at the top of the treeview that allows you to load all pages (and therefore expand all treeview nodes) when clicked (default state is always lazy loading).  Selecting any page will provide a selected state that displays an 'ellipses' menu (that exposes the in-context items).     Icons:  - Open/Close:  -- Plus: when clicked, will expand the current node  --- Use lazy loading to load child pages at this time if not previously loaded  -- Minus: when clicked, will collapse the node  - Page Type:   -- Page = box outline icon  -- URL = Link icon  -- File = File icon  - Page Status (to right of page name):  -- Draft pencil - only seen when unpublished pages available for that page    Notes:   - The In-Context menu is covered via a separate Jira  - The attached mockup shows a selected page  - The entire list of pages can load into the treeview, there will be no permissions check in loading the treeview  -- The permissions check occurs when selecting a specific page  --- This will determine what actions are available in the in-context menu as well as if they can view page details on the right-side; must have edit in Platform or """"Manage"""" in Evoq  - Pages that are hidden are a shown in a lighter color and their name is in italics    UI Behavior of Drag and Drop:  - Hover highlights the page with a 1 px blue surrounding box as shown, cursor should change to the drag and drop cursor...    !A01_Tree Interaction_Hover on a Page.png|thumbnail!   - dragging the page BETWEEN two other pages shows a 2 px blue line in between the pages indicating where the page will land... one important detail there to note regarding the interaction... when you drag the page, the page immediately disappears from the tree, the tree should have the blank space, and then close the gap where that page used to be, and then reveal the 2 px blue line...  while the dragged page is """"In your hand""""...  User can drag the page up and down the tree and the 2 px blue line would move up and down the tree, when you drop it, the tree should first expand to create a space, and the page appears, and then becomes the ACTIVE PAGE...    !A02_Tree Interaction_Dragging the Page.png|thumbnail!  !A03_Tree Interaction_Dragging the Page BETWEEN OTHER PAGES.png|thumbnail!    - dragging the page ONTO another page highlights the target page blue, including the icon, and dropping there will make the dragged page a CHILD of that target page... the target parent expands, revealing the added child which becomes the ACTIVE PAGE in the tree  !A04_Tree Interaction_Dragging the Page ONTO ANOTHER PAGE.png|thumbnail!  !A05_Tree Interaction_After Dragging Onto Another Page_Becomes Child and Expand Parent.png|thumbnail!  - note: all blues here should be Curious Blue #1E88C3    Evoq vs. Platform:  - In-context menu has different options (covered via that story)  - Draft pencil (to right of page name) is only available in Evoq  -- It could show in Platform but there is no draft status in Platform  """

description: """Whenever a page having URL binding to any invalid/deleted portal alias, PB page settings will be broken. Expected Result:  svg file uploads without any errors. summary: "SI: Password reset not giving option to use username"
description: """When enabling """"use email address as username"""" and two users have the same email, reset password does not work for these users. Entering the email to reset password will give this message: """"More than one user has been found with this email address. Please enter your username and try again."""" There is no option to use username for this.     Additionally, only one user can log in with the email. if the other user tries logging in with its username, error gets logged for duplicate key. Log file attached.     Requirements:   - In web.config, requiresUniqueEmail is set to false.   - 2 users with the same email but different username.     - SMTP set up.     Steps to produce:   1. Login as a host user and create 2 accounts with same email address, but different usernames.   2. Enable use email address as username in Persona Bar > Settings > Security > Member Accounts > Registration Settings.   3. Logout, click login and reset password. Try to reset the password for these users.         Video for more details: https://www.screencast.com/t/AQ5YIKoNj  """

summary: "PB Pages: Settings - Call API to refresh the page URL list when needed"
description: """Under PB > Page Settings > Advanced > SEO, the URL list only gets updated based on the client side cache so that in some cases the entries won't match the real values in db (server cache gets cleared whenever there's a tab url change). Workaround now is to refresh the page and then it show the correct entries. We need to call an API to get the new url list rather than rely on local cache.    Repro steps,  1. log in as host to platform site 9.0 or up  2. create a new page called """"test""""  3. go to """"test"""" page settings seo and add a new url w/ type 200 & url path """"test1""""    Expected result,  see 1 """"200"""" for """"test1"""" and 1 301 for """"test""""    Actual result,  see two """"200"""" urls and refresh the page fix it      Also, we should prevent UI from calling update api if user clicks """"Save"""" without doing any change."""

summary: "Turn off Display Module on All Pages causes module deleted from master page"
description: """Repro steps,    1. log in as host on platform site  2. go into edit mode on Home page, choose any existing module and click its gear icon to Settings  3. under Advanced Settings, check Display Module on All Pages and save  4. now the module available on all pages, go to any other page (not Home page)  5. go into edit mode and click the gear icon of that module we just copied  6. uncheck Display Module on All Pages and save    Expected result,  module deleted from all pages but not Home page     Actual result,  module deleted from Home page but still available on other pages  """
comments: "Tried the following:  1. Created new page *Page2*  2. Added module on the page  3. Checked *Display Module on All Pages and save* checkbox  4. Module appeared on Home page  5. Unchecked it on Home page and Module removed from *Page2*   6. Repeated step 5 for *Page2* and now module removed from Home page and was only visible on *Page2*    So, module will be removed from all page except the one you have opened and are unchecking *Display Module on All Pages and save* checkbox    [~accountid:<USER> What do you think, isn't it an expected behavior?" [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER>, thanks for verifying! Seems to me that we should only allow user to modify the ""Display Module on All Pages"" setting on the master page. Also, in Evoq if we turn on this setting again after your step #5 or #6, module won't be visible on all pages automatically since other pages won't be auto published, which is different from its default behavior. Any thoughts [~accountid:<USER>?    P.S. Behavior in Evoq is a bit different from that in pl

summary: "MVC ViewEngineCollection with multiple portals"
description: """When changing the default views location path for the MVC DnnController according to [https://dnntracker.atlassian.net/browse/DNN-8440#DNN-8440], if I have multiple portals the first one loads caches the views engines/locations and affects any other portal loads after it.    The issue:  The “DotNetNuke.Web.Mvc.Framework.ModuleDelegatingViewEngine” contains RazorViewEngine(s) for different portals, therefor the “System.Web.Mvc.ViewEngineCollection” will return a wrong result until the DNN cache cleared.    Solution:  I did a quick simple fix, but I think it should be reviewed as each portal should not read any values from other portals in the first place.  I opened “\DNN Platform\DotNetNuke.Web.Mvc\Framework\Controllers\DnnController.cs”  Replaced the two line 102 & 118 “ViewEngineCollection = ViewEngineCollection” with “ViewEngineCollection = ViewEngineCollectionEx”  """

summary: "Recycle Bin - Needs lazy loading"
description: """The Recycle Bin currently attempts to load every page, module, template and user as soon as the user opens the module. If there are a significant number of items, this can pose a huge performance issue, and even render the module/website unusable.     Please load the first 15 items for each tab: pages, modules, users, templates; and implement lazy loading, on individual tabs, when the user begins to scroll towards the bottom. The items should begin loading *_before_* the user actually reaches the bottom of the page."""

summary: "Updating Profile clears entire cache"
description: """When you update a profile it clears the entire dnn cache (really bad for large site).    If you look in profile.ascx.cs you'll see:                    //Update DisplayName to conform to Format                  UpdateDisplayName();                    //update the user details  *                DataCache.ClearCache();*                    if (PortalSettings.Registration.RequireUniqueDisplayName)                  {                      var usersWithSameDisplayName = (List<UserInfo>)MembershipProvider.Instance().GetUsersBasicSearch(PortalId, 0, 2, """"DisplayName"""", true, """"DisplayName"""", User.DisplayName);                      if (usersWithSameDisplayName.Any(user => user.UserID != User.UserID))                      {                          AddModuleMessage(""""DisplayNameNotUnique"""", ModuleMessage.ModuleMessageType.RedError, true);                          return;                      }                  }                    var properties = (ProfilePropertyDefinitionCollection)ProfileProperties.DataSource;                    //Update User's profile                  User = ProfileController.UpdateUserProfile(User, properties);    It really should be calling DataCache.ClearUserCache(portalId, username) however this is a bug as well:            DataCache.RemoveCache(string.Format(""""UserInfo|{0}|{1}"""", (object) PortalId, (object) username));        DataCache.RemoveCache(string.Format(""""UserProfile|{0}|{1}"""", (object) PortalId, (object) username));    It's trying to clear using username but the cache keys are actually stored as """"userIds"""", so it should be:          DataCache.RemoveCache(string.Format(""""UserInfo|{0}|{1}"""", (object) PortalId, (object) userid));        DataCache.RemoveCache(string.Format(""""UserProfile|{0}|{1}"""", (object) PortalId, (object) userid));    If these updates are made, you can use remove user cache and avoid an entire sitewide cache clear."""

summary: "Import/Export jobs finished with errors remain in ""In Progress"" state forever"
description: """If for whatever reason an Import/Export job finishes with errors the job remains in """"In progress"""" state forever. F.i: follow the steps for DNN-9899.    *Steps to reproduct*  - Do a new install of Platform 9.1.1.89-128  - Log in as host  - Go to Settings-> Import/Export  - Click on """"Export Data""""  - Click on """"Begin Export""""    *Expected result*  - If the Export job has errors, it should be in """"Finished with errors"""" state    *Actual result*  - The Export job remains in """"In progress"""" forever"""
comments: "[~accountid:<USER>, this is not a normal case. I/E code-base has good measures to change the state to FAILED when an error occurs. The only time that the code can't handle errors is when w3wp process terminates without having proper shutdown (e.g., killed through task manager, iisreset, etc.) In such cases we can't do anything; the only option left for the customer is to delete this task and start the I/E task over."

summary: "Import/Export is broken"
description: """If the user tries to Export Data after a clean new installation of the site, an exception is thrown and the process is not done.    *Steps to reproduct*  - Do a new install of Platform 9.1.1.89-128  - Log in as host  - Go to Settings-> Import/Export  - Click on """"Export Data""""  - Click on """"Begin Export""""    *Expected result*  - The export job finishes correctly and the Export is done    *Actual result*  - The export job never ends (always In Progress state) and an exception is registered in the log:     DotNetNuke.Services.Exceptions.Exceptions - System.NullReferenceException: Referencia a objeto no establecida como instancia de un objeto.     en Dnn.ExportImport.Components.Engines.ExportImportEngine.GetAllCategoriesToInclude(ExportDto exportDto, List`1 implementors)     en Dnn.ExportImport.Components.Engines.ExportImportEngine.Export(ExportImportJob exportJob, ExportImportResult result, ScheduleHistoryItem scheduleHistoryItem)     en Dnn.ExportImport.Components.Scheduler.ExportImportScheduler.DoWork()"""
comments: "The issue occurs because when we load the export page and do not click on the pages at all the new page picker component sends json object({TabId: null, ParentTabId: null}) in request but the expect is json array (something like this [{TabId: -1, ParentTabId: 0, CheckedState: 2, Name: ""My Website""}]). summary: "SI: Ability to locate Orphaned Files"
description: """A customer would like the ability to locate Orphaned files (Old files that aren't being used on pages, modules, etc) and way to remove them once found.    This would be useful for website clean-up and making it easy to free up space on the site.    Additional Comments from customer:    Document Scenario – A new version of an existing pdf or other file type is uploaded to the website to replace an existing document. The content editor doesn’t take the care to use the exact same file name and overwrite the existing pdf. Instead the new file with some unique file name is uploaded and linked to in the page content and the old file remains, no longer linked to or in use. The old file doesn’t get deleted from the site and has been orphaned from use on any page.    Image scenario – Images are frequently updated, each with its own unique file name. Previously viewed old images simply pile up in their folders and become clutter.    Desired functionality would identify files in the /Document and /Image directories that have no active relationship with any page and provide admin the ability to manage them individually or in mass.    Additional benefit: remove files that search engines may otherwise provide inappropriate search results to."""
comments: "There is no way for us to take a full inventory and define what isn't in use (there are third party modules to consider, plus people providing direct links); therefore I am closing this as won't fix because it isn't possible. " [SEP] "I will also add that we are adding some analytics and tracking for assets in 9.2 which could help in the future but won't be a 100% solution as they described here. "

summary: "ResourceFileInstaller fails to update resource files"
description: """It seems that in some cases during upgrade of resource files dnn9 tries to create new resource file while old version has not been deleted yet.     We see this error on our production environments where we have separate hosting machine (VM03) and web-site files on different server (VM07). The problems occur with upgrade of modules containing large resource files. Symptoms: upgrade of modules fail on random resource files. For example:         Additional information from dnn log shows """"The process cannot access the file xxx because it is being used by another process."""":      It is known problem in .NET that after deletion of the file it takes some time before the file actually disappears, and instead of try to relay on File.Exists function it's better to wait until file will be unlocked using [FileSystemWatcher|https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/system.io.filesystemwatcher.aspx]."""
comments: "Proposed fix:   https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1737" [SEP] "Any reason why fix to the problem could not be merged?" [SEP] "Could we proceed fix for the issue and include it into DNN 9.2 release?  " [SEP] "I reviewed, tested, and merged this PR.    For QA testers:  There are two unit tests for this fix and they are passing. The testers must try installing multiple times and see if any error written in the log files. It is not easy to test manually as the wait is very short (1 second) and it is hard to lock a file for 1 second or part of it for manual testing. The best thing is to make sure the automation tests (both new installations and upgrades) are passing; they do all of this and check the log files." [SEP] "Verified in 9.2.0 #111 736 & checked automation tests are passing too.    Closing this JIRA for now"

summary: "URL pages incorrectly excluded from Add Existing Module picker"
description: """If you have a page which redirects (i.e. its type is Tab or URL), but it also has children, that page does not show up in the page picker for selecting an existing module, which means that its children cannot be selected, either (though the children are available by searching).    As an example:   - _Advocacy_ (redirect to {{/Advocacy/Overview}})   --  _Overview_   --  _Details_    None of these three pages would show, and modules on _Overview_ would not be available to be copied to _Details_ (or anywhere else).    This manifests itself in a couple of different ways.  The {{DnnPortalPageDropDownList}} is a control available to 3rd party developers to use, and it uses the web service {{ItemListService/GetPageDescendantsInPortalGroup}} to retrieve pages.  If you setup a site with the above page structure in portal 0, you can go to {{/DesktopModules/InternalServices/API/ItemListService/GetPageDescendantsInPortalGroup?parentId=P-0&sortOrder=0&searchText=&includeDisabled=true&includeAllTypes=true&includeActive=false&includeHostPages=false&roles=}} in a browser to see the JSON returned from that call, and see that it does not include those pages.  The issue is that {{includeAllTypes=true}} is ignored in the code path that gets hit.  I have a PR to fix this.    In DNN 9, a different web service is used, {{ItemListService/GetPages}}, and that call just needs to have {{includeAllTypes=true}} added as a query-string parameter.  I wasn't able to quickly find where in the persona bar that call was happening, so that fix is _not_ included in the related PR."""
comments: "https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1735 is the PR" [SEP] "PR submitted, added includeAllTypes=true to ItemListService/GetPages api call  https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.EditBar/pull/5" [SEP] "Changes looks good and merged, verify need be done both in platform and evoq." summary: "SI: PB Settings: Favicon applied for different portal is not applied correctly"
description: """Noticed in Content 9.1.0    Preconditions:  - Have a child site    Steps to reproduce:  1. On the main portal > Go to Sites > Edit the child site while you're in the main portal (click gear icon)  2. Upload a favicon to the child site    Expected Result:  Favicon is uploaded and is applied to the child site.    Actual Result:  There is no change. The favicon is uploaded to the main site not the child.    The bug occurs when you try to set the favicon for a different portal than the portal you're currently on. When uploading the favicon file, it will actually upload the file in the portal you're currently on rather than the portal you're changing the favicon for. The portal you would wish to change would look for the favicon in it's own portal directory, but since it has not been uploaded to the correct location, the favicon will not change.    The workaround for this was to upload the favicon file in the correct portal and point the fileid to that folder or browse to the child site and set the favicon there through site settings."""

summary: "SMTP Username overwrites mailMessage.Sender and fails with Azure SendGrid"
description: """TLDR Description:  If your SMTP server settings requires a username and that username has an """"@"""" symbol in it, the mailMessage.Sender field may be overwritten with the SMTP Username setting.    Description:  We migrated our website to Azure recently and configured our email to use the SendGrid azure implementation.  By default, when signing up for SendGrid through Azure, your username is in the form of 'azure_[numbers]@azure.com'. This is used for the SMTP authentication when sending emails.  We also configured SendGrid with WhiteLabels so that emails sent from our website will properly show to customers instead of getting the annoying """"Sent on behalf of"""" From name.    We then configured our host account to the name 'noreply@[domain].com'.  Generally, we use this email form when configuring a site as we don't want people replying to messages automatically sent from the system.  When we call any of the methods of DotNetNuke.Services.Mail.Mail.SendMail(...), and manually specifying an email address of 'noreply@[domain].com', all our messages are not WhiteLabeled and the headers are incorrect for the sender (see dnn_BadHeaders.png -- the header on the left is bad, the right is good).  The right is good because we were sending from webmaster@ instead of the usual noreply.    I decompiled the DotnetNuke.Services.Mail information to see how the SendMailInternal function handled my sender fields and if there was a work around I could use.  And I found the code explicitly overwrites the sender information with the SMTP username in a certain condition.  See dnn_SendMailInternal.png.    This should be updated so that you can have SMTP usernames with @ signs in them as that is the default for Azure SendGrid implementations."""

summary: "Installing modules very slow with many portals"
description: """The module install page (/Install/Install.aspx?mode=installresources) is very slow on sites with a lot of portals due to a high number of database calls.  That process currently calls GetPortalDesktopModules for every module on every portal.    I've implemented a fix which only calls GetPortalDesktopModules once per module in the outer loop and then passes that dictionary of modules down to the inner loop.  The new dictionary parameter is optional, and if the parameter is not provided it will fall back on the old mechanism (fetching from the database).  This maintains backwards compatibility and isolates the changes to the module install page.    Our DNN instance has 35 modules and over 3600 portals.  We did a database trace and found that this was making over 100,000 database calls.  This was causing our install process to take over 31 minutes with no load (about an hour with load).    After implementing the change, we have significantly reduced our install time from 31 minutes to under 1.5 minutes (from 58 to under 4 minutes with load).    The patch file for this fix is attached, I have discussed it with [~accountid:<USER> and will submit a pull request shortly."""
