summary: "Password history should support a minimum time before reuse"
description: """As part of a security audit, it came up that we couldn't set a minimum timeframe before a password can be reused.  So, while we can say that you can't reuse your last six (for example) passwords, there's nothing to stop you from changing you password six times in a row and reusing your original password.    I'd like to propose adding a new setting with the minimum number of days before passwords can be reused (our client's requirements are six months, but I would plan to default to zero, for backwards compatibility, unless y'all think there should be a default)."""

summary: "SI: E-mail address harvesting on reset password."
description: """When the site is setup to use email addresses as usernames and also to use unique email addresses. When a user tries to reset a password, they will be prompted with a message if the e-mail is not in use, or they will receive a different result if it does exist which might lead to some account harvesting.    This is the block of code showing the message:    https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/blob/517f7630bb34d66ed0a21350c0e1461f078f182d/Website/admin/Security/SendPassword.ascx.cs#L347-L355"""

summary: "SI: Add timezone to schedule publishing"
description: """Customer requested to have timezone option or conversion tool for publishing.     For example, if they want to publish content at 10am Berlin time, they don't have to select 1am PST."""
comments: "Prior to adding a Time Zone selector control to the UI, the data should be migrated to be stored and transferred from/to the database always in UTC. Client side modules might get the data in UTC as well as the user time zone and would have to convert the time value accordingly. This way a specific time zone could be added to a content item to use a different conversion for it." [SEP] "I would assume, this is a rarely used feature, there should be a collection of use cases first. Should the time zone be derived from portal default, language or any other property besides user profile setting?" [SEP] "All times in the product are supposed to be presented to the end user in their timezone (if set in the profile) or fallback to the site settings for timezone. If this is not the case in some areas, a bug should be created. As-is, we won't be adding the ability to select timezone for publishing broadly across the project and will continue the pattern we have today. "

summary: "Wrong PortalID parser in ajax call of Child Portal"
description: """ I have a parent portal is domainA.com and some child portals like domainA.com/child    After researching around the DNNPlatform, I recognize that DNN is getting wrong PortalID of child portal when calling the ajax request because it removed the """"/child"""" to use API path like """"domainA.com/DesktopModules/xxxx/xx""""    I suggest that, they should compare with """"Referer"""" instead of using request URL only.     Can DNN team help us to fix this bug?    Thank you"""
comments: "[~accountid:<USER> How/Where are you seeing this problem (we need steps to reproduce)? " [SEP] "We are also seeing this. When performing a WebAPI service call on a child portal PortalSettings.PortalId in the service controller is always 0. ActiveModule.PortalID does contain the correct PortalID." [SEP] "In WebAPI calls you should be using ActiveModule.OwnerPortalID (you could use PortalID but OwnerPortalID is more accurate for sharing modules across sites). " [SEP] "Thank you Chris. But the real issue is that the PortalId in portalsettings is incorrect. If we would call any controller that would try and get the portalId from the portalsettings it would get the wrong one." [SEP] "for API request in child portal, you need set the API url as: domain.com/child/API/...., only with correct domain name will get correct portal id.    if the request are comes from core, please let us know how to reproduce the issue and we will handle it, thx so much!" [SEP] "Closing this JIRA as CNR as per above comment."

summary: "SI: CAPTCHA Timeout Setting"
description: """Currently there is no setting to set the timeout value for CAPTCHA codes. A client has asked for this enhancement as users of his site are experiencing issues with CAPTCHA issuing an """"incorrect input"""" message even though they have inputted the correct values due to a timeout."""
comments: "[~accountid:<USER>, please review this PR https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1955    I updated the code to use the HOST setting key ""*EXPIRATION_DEFAULT*"" if present. This key must contain the number of seconds for expiration. The default in case the key is not present is 120 seconds (2 minutes). There is no UI for setting this up, but site admin can add this directly to the database  and clear the cache for it to take effect.    For QA testers, they need to enable the captcha (say for reset password under {{PB > Security > Login Settings}}) and to try resetting the password. Without any change, if the tester waits for over 2 minutes, and submit with the correct captcha text, they will see an error notification of invalid captcha. Not, the tester needs to add this setting to the database with some value - say 180 (i.e., 3 minutes) and repeat the test. They should see no error if they wait less than 3 minutes, but see an error if they wait more than 3 minutes.    Note: if you see any other err

summary: "Cannot access files in renamed folder unless the cache is cleared"
description: """Steps to reproduce:    - go to dnn file manager (aka site assets)  - create """"my folder""""  - in this new folder, upload file1.jpg and file2.jpg  -  open file1.jpg  - rename """"my folder"""" as whatever (e.g. """"my folder renamed"""")  - try to open file1.jpg  ==> BOOM! 404 - not found error page  - clear dnn cache  - - try to open file1.jpg => no problem      The problem is: even though the folder was renamed, the file's RelativePath still holds the old (unrenamed) path (the file's properties should be cached, and it wasn't updated or deleted after its parent folder was renamed)"""
comments: "DNN-8893: clear child files' cache after folder renamed.    PR: https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/2008.    [~accountid:<USER>, can you please help me review the changes? thx."

summary: "RGR - Reset password link is not expiring"
description: """Preconditions:  A user is created by admin/host/testuser in the system  *Login as testUser and reset the password 1st time.*  SMTP is setup with Papercut to receive emails on port 25  Steps:  1. As host go to Host Settings - Host Settings - Advanced Settings - Membership Management  2. Change """"Reset link timeout"""" and set it to 1 and update the page  3. In a different browser browse to the site and click on login and then click on reset password  4. Enter the username and click on Send reset link  5. On Papercut intercept the email and extract the reset link  6. Wait for more than a min (i.e wait for 5 min)  7. Browse to the link from the email  8. Enter username and new password and confirm it and click to reset password  Expected results:  Error displayed on page that either password is not confirmed or token is expired  Password does NOT change  Actual result:  Link is accepted and password is able to reset after 5 min. Looks like the setting in step 2 above is not effective.  """
comments: "8.0 seems have the same problem. Also noticed PasswordResetExpiration won't be reset if its value is >= DateTime.Now." [SEP] "PR submitted, https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1723" [SEP] "The changes will broken DNN-7071 so reject. IMHO this item doesn't need to fix, because the reset timeout is 60 minutes by default. so the password token will keep in 60 minutes it it generated before timeout settings changed. after 60 minutes, the token will be expired, then new expire time will use new setting." [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER>, thx for letting me know there was a fix for 7071. The only problem now is if user requests pwd reset within the first day of his/her account gets created, it won't respect the pwd reset token expiration setting since the default expiration date is 1440 min which is 1 day. I can just add one more condition like if (user.PasswordResetExpiration < DateTime.Now || user.PasswordResetExpiration > DateTime.Now.AddMinutes(settings.ResetLinkValidity)) then reset token. works?" [SEP]

summary: "SEO - Site Map - User generated pages not showing up in SiteMap.aspx"
description: """In any DNN 9.1.0 product create new pages in the site  Set their *Page View Permissions* to *All users*  Save and if necessary, publish the page(s)  Visit the <page URL>/sitemap.aspx page    Actual Result:  Only system pages appear in the sitemap.aspx page    Expected Result:  Pages that are permissioned *All Users* and are *not marked as hidden* will appear in the sitemap.aspx page    Things I tried  in DNN framework  *Clear Application Cache*  *Restart Application*  Restart *Search Crawler*  Changed *Priority for Pages*  Turned on *Use Page Level Based Priorities*  Turned on *Include Hidden Pages*    In IIS  *IISRESET* in a DOS prompt    Published information on SiteMap.aspx in DNN:  http://www.dnnsoftware.com/docs/administrators/sitemaps/configure-sitemap.html"""
comments: "So the issue here was that prior to *DNN 9* the *SiteMap Priority* when a page was created was auto set to *0.5*  Post *DNN 9* it is set to *NULL*  Setting the *SiteMap Priority* when creating a page to any value < 1 solves the issue"

summary: "Add per portal/site Site Settings options to set custom titles for Register and Login"
description: """It would be nice to have two site settings options (per portal/site) that allow for the ability to easily change the title of the Register and Login titles (e.g. from the defaults to Sign Up and Log In).  The values could be stored in the database by portal ID, and then used either within the resource files, or called specifically by code. """
comments: "We are trying to avoid adding more settings into the UI unless absolutely necessary. Based on how Google (and others) are pushing SSL for registration and login for all sites; best practices at this point are that you specific both pages today in your site and force SSL (which means you can specify the names for those pages and their titles too; in future versions post 9.1 we will be updating the default site templates to have these set too).     Because of the things I mentioned above, I don't see us changing the product to support these additional settings in the future. " [SEP] "these settings need to be language specific, i.e. should be taken from a resource file."

summary: "Do not crash Persona Bar if some custom settings raise an Exception"
description: """Do not crash Persona Bar if some custom settings raise an Exception.    Custom settings is a mechanism that allow Persona bar module to load in client side settings to be used by the PB Module. This mechanism is widely use in the Persona Bar.    Today if some of this module throw an Exception breaks the entire persona bar.    We should review the code to report the exception in the log but still load the persona bar. The issue will so only affect the specific module with the setting issue.    Note for DEV: we should consider the potencial impact of having this try/catch. As this could potencially full the log with exception and slow down the application until the admin detect the issue and fix it. We have to consider and discuss if we want apply the above solution or keep it as is."""

summary: "SI: Scheduler Duration Calculation"
description: """When a task gets interrupted, example app pool recycles in the middle of search index, the duration is not calculated correctly.    The duration just counts the time between now and when the task started. The application doesn't recognize that the task stopped unexpectedly, so the duration just keeps climbing indefinitely. This can be confusing to new users who think that the task is still running, even if there is a newer execution of the task."""

summary: "Composite Files Missing & Not HTTP/2 Compatible"
description: """Composite Files commonly produce missing files (404) when searching the server cache. In addition, now that I am a HTTP/2 site, composite file no longer helps.    I have been trying to turn this off at every level (web config, etc), and even pulled the source to track the missing files. I learned the composite files are constructed REGARDLESS of the setting to turn it off. Then it is returned upon request IF IT WAS TURNED ON. This is backwards.  If a search engine has an old copy, we need to deliver it regardless.    On top of this, if you read the HTTP/2 best practices, we should no longer be doing any kind of combining of files or versioning (unless absolutely necessary). We have version numbers on fixed resources like Google Maps, and Jquery. If some of this composite files survives HTTP/2 design, we need the ability to select exactly what changed, and leave version number off of things that don't need new copies.    I get hundreds of these per day...  -----------------  2017-04-14 01:43:21,506 [SV1][Thread:72][FATAL] DotNetNuke.Web.Common.Internal.DotNetNukeHttpApplication - System.Web.HttpException (0x80004005): File not found     at ClientDependency.Core.CompositeFiles.CompositeDependencyHandler.ProcessRequestInternal(HttpContextBase context, String fileset, ClientDependencyType type, Int32 version, Byte[] outputBytes, OutputCachedPage page) in C:\Websites\DnnPlatform\Platform\DNN Platform\Components\ClientDependency\Source\CompositeFiles\CompositeDependencyHandler.cs:line 180     at ClientDependency.Core.CompositeFiles.CompositeDependencyHandler.System.Web.IHttpHandler.ProcessRequest(HttpContext context) in C:\Websites\DnnPlatform\Platform\DNN Platform\Components\ClientDependency\Source\CompositeFiles\CompositeDependencyHandler.cs:line 104     at System.Web.HttpApplication.CallHandlerExecutionStep.System.Web.HttpApplication.IExecutionStep.Execute()     at System.Web.HttpApplication.ExecuteStep(IExecutionStep step, Boolean& completedSynchronously)"""
comments: "I need to add to this especially since HTTP/2 is enabled by default in IIS 10.       DNN's Client Resource Management and Client Dependency System auto add a ""?cdv=000"" to the end of any and all JS or CSS files that are called by the skin, containers or default files (whether composite files are enabled or not).  HTTP/2 and/or SPDY does not accept query strings for these type of documents.      WebKit browsers (Google Chrome and Apple Safari) utilize SPDY for HTTP/2 connections and will prevent these files from loading. If you access their developer tools you will see the errors when loading the page under networking.  Also, each time the browser calls for one of these files and throws its error locally, the error (as stated in the original description) is logged in DNN.      The only workaround is to temporally disable HTTP/2 in IIS by adding two registry keys to the server as referenced here: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/31718533/disabling-http-2-spdy-in-http-sys-and-iis-in-windows-10    We sure c

Expected result, notification would be in German    Actual result, email is in German, Notification is English (see attached)     """

IMO this is the expected behavior and we don't need to change it, if you still think it need be change, can you confirm with PM about this behavior first? thx so much," [SEP] "this is a pretty old issue, so I am not sure it is relevant to the customer anymore. summary: "SI: DDR Menu w/ NodeSelector Does Not Render On Hidden Pages"
description: """*Synopsis*: DDR Menu    *Steps To Replicate:*    1) Create a new page called """"A"""" and position it as a child of Home    2) Create a new page called """"B"""" and position it as a child of Home/A/    3) In the skin file add the NodeSelector option to the DDR menu as per below  <dnn:MENU MenuStyle=""""Simple"""" runat=""""server"""" NodeSelector=""""-1,0,1"""">    4) DDR menu appears on page """"B""""    5) Set B to be hidden in the Page Settings    6) DDR meny vanishes from page """"B""""    Tried various NodeSelector settings with the following results    RootOnly = Menu  RootChildren = Menu  CurrentChildren = No Menu  PageID (using tabid for Home) = Menu  Root/Skip/depth of -1,0,1 = No Menu"""
comments: "That should be expected behavior as hidden pages won't display in menu as default. if you really want to display hidden pages, you can add IncludeHidden attribute to menu tag and set its value to true:  <dnn:MENU MenuStyle=""Menus/MainMenu"" runat=""server"" NodeSelector=""-1,0,1"" *IncludeHidden=""true""*></dnn:MENU>"

summary: "Persona Bar - Add to global config PreferredTimeZone and PreferredLocale"
description: """Persona Bar exposes a serie of global settings in a config variable. As part of this jira we want add two new user configs:    * PreferredTimeZone  * PreferredLocale    In this way we will be able to localize dates or other resources sensible to culture (i.e.: numbers) and also properly format dates to current user time zone.    The new two settings need to be added here:  * https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.AdminExperience.Library/blob/development/src/Dnn.PersonaBar.Library/Containers/PersonaBarContainer.cs#L78    Note: we do not want to expose these two settings in the UI yet. This is just to expose in code to be used by other persona bar panels as general context info."""
comments: "please note that both settings are determined by User Profile Properties." summary: "PB General: Does not clear resource cache after new PersonaBar extension has been installed"
description: """The frontend gets the resources for the PersonaBar extensions from the API http://.../API/personaBar/localization/gettable?culture=[...] and this API implements a caching mechanism that stores the resources in a assembled cache file (DesktopModules\Admin\Dnn.PersonaBar\Resources\LocalResources.[...].resources).    IMHO, there is a problem in the logic that decides whether or not the cached file needs to be regenerated (see Expired() method here: https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.AdminExperience.Library/blob/7203f79f4dda857d6d9211cd61f272c80b5ac333/src/Modules/UI/Dnn.PersonaBar.UI/Services/LocalizationController.cs#L82). This method tests if there is any .resx file that is newer (based in the LastWriteTime ) than the assembled cache file. The problem is, that the LastWriteTime information of the """"PersonaBar extension's resx file get not updated in the installation process and in result the frontend does not get the resources.    Summarized: After installing a new PersonaBar extension, the resources are missing.    A workaround is to manually delete the assembled cache file to force this file to be regenerated."""
comments: "DNN-9636: check expire with resources file's creation time as well.    with the attached test package, actually i can not reproduce the issue, but for safety, submite the PR to check file creation time as well." [SEP] "Although I couldn't replicate this issue either, change looks good for the case LastWriteTime earlier than CreationTime, PR merged. Available in platform build# 9.1.1.66-62.  " [SEP] "Verified and Issue cannot be reproduced in Platform v. 09.01.01 (100) (/) & resources file getting modified after refreshing the page.  "

summary: "Default install asp.net temp folder causes performance"
description: """The default installation web.config uses the Windows/temp for temporary asp.net files.  It could be that modifying that to a directory within the app like app_data/_temp or something similar would benefit many installations.    I resolved an ambiguous Razor Cleanup error and noticeably improved an installs overall performance by making the changes based upon the last post on this thread.     http://stackoverflow.com/questions/41816829/app-pool-recycle-in-iis-is-changing-file-permissions-on-a-dll    The installation that I modified was shared hosting environment which I expect is a large part of the reason as to why it helped the sites performance. I dedicated server or perhaps any well maintained server may see no improvement.     Unless I've overlooked something it would seem a smart defensive measure to modify the default installation web.config compilation tempDirectory?    Example web.config snippet :    <system.web>  <compilation tempDirectory=""""PathToYourSite\App_Data\_temp"""" debug=""""false"""" strict=""""false"""" targetFramework=""""4.5"""">"""
comments: "Sorry for the mispellings.    <compilation tempDirectory=""PathToYourSite\App_Data\_temp"" debug=""false"" strict=""false"" targetFramework=""4.5"">" [SEP] "UI won't take the last back slash before the hidden _temp dir..."

summary: "I/E: Pages Export/Import"
description: """We previously allowed a page to be exported (prior to 9.1) and this wrote the tab settings (most of them), modules and module settings (along with tab module settings) to the export file (in xml). We want to retain everything it previously did (not necessarily how it did things before) and then account for additional concerns. When """"Include Content"""" is chosen as part of the export process, this is when the modules and the module settings (along with TabModuleSettings) should be included (like older versions). When a page exists in the import, the import process needs to replace it (in the end, the page should look identical to the place it was exported from and nothing should be in the recycle bin in the destination related to the page).     *Page Settings to Export*  - Details:   -- Page Type (Based on type, all values surfaced like PermanentRedirect, DisableLink), Name, Title, Description, Keywords, Tags, Display in menu, Link Tracking, Enable Scheduling (start/end dates if applicable), Workflow  - Permissions:  -- Include all role and user permissions that are applied ONLY if permissions are selected as part of export  - Advanced:   -- Appearance: Page Theme, Layout & container along with stylesheet  -- SEO: Sitemap Priority, Page Header Tags, Allow Indexing (moving from More Tab see [DNN-9301]), URLs  -- More: Secure Connection, Disable Page (adding, see [DNN-9301]), Output Cache Provider  - No UI:  -- CultureCode, IconFileLarge, IconFile    Related Jira Notes:  - [DNN-9628]: This is something that is determined as part of the export process.   - [CONTENT-6092]: We are only including published pages in the export and therefore all imported pages should be published upon successful import.   - [DNN-9212]: We will continue to include taburls but it shouldn't be based on any id (on the name, instead)  - [DNN-8219]: Including CSS files  - [DNN-9543]: We need to include the setting """"allow indexing""""  - [DNN-7700]: Culture Code should be part of page export (and import)  - [DNN-8856]: We need to include page tags (and categories)    Note in Scope:  - Page content items  - Module content items  - TabAliasSkin  - Tab Versions"""

summary: "Encoding for username lost in verification email"
description: """The URL in the default verification email uses the form {{http://[Portal:URL]/default.aspx?ctl=Login&username=[Custom:0]&verificationcode=[Custom:1]}}, which produces a URL like {{http://www.dnnsoftware.com/default.aspx?ctl=Login&username=bdukes%2bverificationtest%40engagesoftware.com&verificationcode=xyz}}.    This URL gets redirected to {{/login?username=bdukes+<EMAIL>}}, where the encoding for the + has been lost.  As a result, the username field in the login control is incorrect, showing a space instead of a {{+}} in the username.    The """"minimal"""" reproduction case for this is a URL like {{https://www.dnnsoftware.com/default.aspx?ctl=Login&username=bdukes%2bverificationtest%40engagesoftware.com}}.  If you remove {{default.aspx}} or {{ctl=Login}}, then the encoding is correctly preserved.  It is only the combination of these two elements that causes the encoding to be lost (the redirect from HTTP to HTTPS also does not affect the encoding).    h2. Steps to Reproduce  # Navigate to https://www.dnnsoftware.com/default.aspx?ctl=Login&username=bdukes%2bverificationtest%40engagesoftware.com    h3. Expected Results  The username field on the login is {{bdukes+<EMAIL>}}    h3. Actual Results  The username field on the login is {{bdukes <EMAIL>}}"""
comments: "DNN-9546: encode the query string parameters.    this issue will occur with pre-condition:  1. registration mode set to ""Verified"";  2. custom login page defined." summary: "SI: Translating Resources files adds extra encoding"
description: """Verbatim from client:    When selecting a file with encoded html codes like < > intended mainly for html emails, when saved it encodes """"&"""" again saving them as  &amp;lt; this happens every time you save a file, each time adding & even if you are not editing this values. Making html emails unusable. I had to fix them directly from the file system, so using this tool when at least one Key/Value have this kind o codes is a bad idea. Probably even if you use """"&"""" not for html, y saved multiple times, this might have terrible results without user knowing it until they see where it is displayed.    Besides of this being a problem, saving double html encode, I got to this issue trying to translate email notification and formatting them, and how it works now is kind of complicated, it would be even better and easier to have a global or by site configuration, email templates, like if having skins, so the content would be dynamic but all around from the email """"skin"""", that feature would make having all email and notifications same look & feel.    Steps to Reproduce:    1. Go to Settings > Site Settings > Localization > Translate Resource Files > Select a Resource file (I chose GlobalResources).  2. Put &amp; in the localized value text box for a resource  3. Save Resource File > Refresh    Actual Result:  The localized value will now be &amp;amp; which will display the amp as text and breaks html emails.  Clicking Save Resource File again will create another duplicate amp; on ALL resources int the resource file with amp; in them.    Expected Result:  The localized value will only display one '&'    !amp_error.png|width=1000!"""

With DNN 9, one can go to Personna bar's Content | Pages | Advanced | Modules screen to see a list of modules. summary: "Anonymous users can view standard folder assets when permissions are restricted to members "
description: """I'm on windows 10, I have DNN 9.0.2 installed.    As a super user...    * I went into site assets and created a new """"standard"""" folder called """"MyDocuments""""  * I then uploaded a standard PDF into the this folder.  * I then went into the folder properties for """"MyDocuments"""" and specifically gave permissions only for registered users to (1) Browse Files in Folder, and (2) Open files in folder.    * As a super user, I can click on the link and see the PDF from this folder location.  * But when I go into incognito mode in my browser, without signing into my DNN platform, I can still see the PDF document.    In conclusion, shouldn't the PDF only be available for """"registered"""" members?  If so, then how come anyone can view this document in incognito mode?"""
comments: "This is working as expected. The permissions you see within the DNN UI are used to determine how the file modules and pickers used throughout the product behave; it is not possible for us to secure files in any ""Standard"" folder if user's know or guess the full URL to the file. If you wish to prohibit people from accessing a file via direct URL, you need to utilize the ""Secure"" folder type. "

summary: "Allow JSX file extension in module installation"
description: """The current frontend views use ReactJS that relies on JSX.     Certain third party modules allow customers to edit display templates (e.g. shopping cart module allows customers to edit JSX file on browser that would be babel-ified on the client side into .js and saved, however, the raw JSX file should still be available for user retrieval and editing). DNN installer should allow including *.jsx files in module packages.    It's an easy change needed to the code under the /Library/Services/Installer/Installers/ModuleInstaller.cs to include the jsx file extension.            public override string AllowableFiles          {              get              {      return """"cshtml, vbhtml, ashx, aspx, ascx, vb, cs, resx, css, js, jsx, resources, config, vbproj, csproj, sln, htm, html, xml, psd, svc, asmx, xsl, xslt"""";              }          }"""
comments: "Can we please bump this? Its an easy one line change that is already included here. "

summary: "SI: Multithreading issues in UserController"
description: """Logged issues from a customer site as follow, need to make the code thread-safety.    Reproduce Steps:  1. install platform latest build, login as host;  2. create 2 regular user user01 and user02;  3. login as user02 with remember me checked, and visit user profile page.  4. open fiddler to capture http request, in browser change the userid in url to user01's userid, and visit it.  5. in fiddler, stop capture, remove all other requests but just keep the record for """"GET /Activity-Feed/userId/3"""";  6. replay this request for multiple times, in my test i repeat 30 times.  7. restart iis, in fiddler, select all requests, and replay them in same time.    Note: if you can't see the error, then repeat #7, the issue will occur sometimes:   !20170315133232.png|width=800!         """
comments: "Here's what we have in GetUserById and GetCachedUser methods under UserController,         Directory is not thread-safe with write accesses. We may use locks or ConcurrentDictionary to prevent this issue." [SEP] "DNN-9492: use shared dictionary instead of common dictionary." [SEP] "Changes look good, PR merged. Available in platform build# 9.1.0.214." [SEP] "Verified in platform 9.1 build 229 and issue is fixed , we are closing the issue.    follow all the steps ans issue is not reproduce in latest build."

summary: "Scheduler Exception on CoreMessaging : Subquery returns more than 1 value "
description: """+Bug+    When a set of users are sent the same message, is possible to get records in the Core_Messaging_Message_Recipients and Core_Messaging_Messages such that when combined, the results of vw_MessagesForDispatch fail with the following exception:        The underlying cause is sending a single message to multiple users.  This can be done by having multiple Content Managers in a site when activating an Evoq Microservice such as Structured Content.  The Content Managers are each sent a notification of the activation, and as such the user notifications preference will fail because of duplicate results in the subquery.    I think this requires having multiple host users and multiple content managers, then activating a microservice.    This will be in the following stack trace:      I think this might be related to having duplicate messages inserted for activation of Microservices - I could be wrong on this however.      The error comes from the stored procedure CoreMessaging_GetNextMessagesForInstantDispatch which then calls the view vw_MessagesForDispatch.    That view has two subqueries in it to get the notification period:      This code effectively joins together the CoreMessaging_Messages and CoreMessaging_MessageRecipients and the CoreMessaging_UserPreferences tables.    +Workaround+  The workaround for this bug is to delete the messages and message recipients for the messages with duplicate records.  This is sufficient to get the core messaging processing again, but it does lose the messages.    +Fix+  The SQL View should be fixed to return the Message Notification or User Notification Preference without doing a subquery - probably by just including the Core_Messaging_UserPreferences table in the query instead of a subquery.    Suggest removing this:      and moving the CoreMessaging_UserPreference to the main table joins, adding a distinct and a new CASE statement for the view      This produces the correct results in the studied (failing) test data, without duplicates, however it hasn't been regression tested to make sure it always delivers to the correct notification preferences."""

summary: "Add scheduler client feature to allow scheduled task to run on single/all servers"
description: """Most of the scheduler clients need to be run on a single server only. By default all server in a web farm pickup the scheduled tasks and run them (except in EVOQ where a server is specified).    The scheduler tasks need to be enhanced by allowing them to run on a single server by default and if needed they can be run on multiple server (for example, when flushing a server's local cached objects). This change should be hard-coded in classes that extends the {{SchedulerClient}} and not dynamic so it can't be set for each installation differently.    It appears that {{Purge Log Buffer}} in Platform needs to run on ALL the servers. Others should run on a specific server only.    We need to do two things:  # Add a virtual property *RunsOnSingeServerOnly*  on {{SchedulerClient}} abstract class. The default being true.  # Make a change in Scheduler engine to see if there are more than one server defined in {{WebServers}} table. If so, and we have tasks like {{Search: Site Crawler}} with no servers specified, it should auto-assign that task to itself.   ## While doing this, it must clear cache so other servers can be made aware that a given task has been assigned to another server, and that they should not attempt to run. """
comments: "The other thing that Bruce and I had noticed, is it would be nice if the schedule knew if the site was still starting up or if it was running, and not start any tasks while the site is trying to start. " [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER> it's already present. In the Scheduler area there is a setting {{Schedule Start Delay (mins)}}. You need to click on the pencil icon next to {{Scheduler Mode}}." [SEP] "Its very important to understand how the current Web Server Monitor task works with this.  For cloud sites, the server URL adapter works with the Web Server Monitor to determine when servers are online/offline.  When servers go offline, the Web Server Monitor sets them to 'disabled' in the web servers table AND finds any scheduled tasks where the server is named as the 'run on' server, and chooses a new server to allocate that task to.    That behaviour works when the server is assigned correctly.  Where we have a problem is when the server goes offline and is not detected that that happened, and then the web server

summary: "Custom module has installation issues after upgrade to DNN9"
description: """A custom modules we developed now encounter errors when trying to install after upgrading to DNN 9.0.1.142. Same problem was encountered in DNN 9.0.2.    The custom module requires 7z.dll this file is included and is one of the assembly components in the installer ZIP file.    Steps to reproduce issue:  1. Upgrade to DNN 9  2. Login to site as host account  3. Go to Extensions page.  4. Click on Install Extension  5. Select the ZIP file and proceed with installation  6. Final step shows installation log has errors. Among them is this section:    Info Assembly already registered - bin\7z.dll  Info Creating backup of previous version - bin\7z.dll  Info Created - bin\7z.dll  Failure Exception - Could not load file or assembly '7z.dll' or one of its dependencies. The module was expected to contain an assembly manifest. summary: "Security: ""DNN Security HotFix 1"" reports false positive warning for text-only Register page"
description: """I just applied the """"DNN Security HotFix 1"""" patch to three DNN sites. In Host > """"DNN Security HotFix 1"""", two of them reported """"WARNING: YOU MAY NOT BE PATCHED."""" I traced the problem down to the fact that the two problem sites had Admin > Site Settings > Advanced Settings > Registration Page set to a page named """"Register"""". The page was a text-only page explaining our """"no registration policy"""". It had absolutely NO third party registration module on the page. So in this case, I believe the warning message was a """"false positive"""" and should be fixed.     If you can't eliminate the warning, then at least adding some text to check your """"Registration Page"""" setting would have been much appreciated and saved me time investigating other modules.    The work-around is to set the """"Registration Page"""" to """"<None Specified>"""" and then Host > """"DNN Security HotFix 1"""" reports """"You are patched.""""    Otherwise, the patch went smoothly. Thanks!"""
comments: "[~accountid:<USER>,    Thanks for reporting this. In fact, the page states the reason for the warning as being due to using a third party registration module (as in the attached sample warning). The site manager(s) should be able identify this module without any further explanation. We contacted third party registration modules suppliers and worked with them on getting their modules fixed. Many of them already fixed their registration modules a while ago. We advice you to contact your supplier.    This is a one-time use patch and we don't intend to perform any maintenance on it anymore as the addressed issue(s) is/are have been fixed in newer releases and we advice you to upgrade your site(s).    For the time being, we will not consider this further unless we receive reports from many others regarding this warning.  " [SEP] "As per above comments closing this JIRA as won't fix (No QA Required)"

summary: "SI: Search Results Filtering Count"
description: """Message directly from site owner:    See attachment of the code tracing done in the DNN Codebase. One of our developers have traced down the potential root cause of the issue, which is the SearchSecurityTrimmer class. All in all, it appears that the Total search results is filtered per page, and not across all results.    That means if all Search Results are viewable on Page 1, then Page 2 have some results that got filtered, then at Page 2 will be the only time that it will decrement the Total Search Results displayed on screen. Essentially, the Total Search Results Count displayed on the Search Results page changes as we browse through every page of the search result.        Steps to reproduce:    1. As a Registered User, Try to do a search now that will have multi-paged results. (i.e. Total: 50 results)   2. Then go to other pages, say Page 2.   3. Pick one of the results in Page 2 and make it inaccessible (i.e. a document that is restricted to the user that is searching)   4. Logout as a Registered User.   5. Login as an Admin/Content Owner and make the item in #3 inaccessible.   6. Logout as Admin/Content Owner.   7. Log back in as a Registered User. Try to search again for the same keyword.   8. At Page 1, Total Results should still be 50. When you go to Page 2, the Total results will be decreased to 49. When you go to Page 3, the Total Results will be back to 50.    Where the problem lies is that the """"Total Results"""" count update takes effect at the point when the item is encountered at its supposed page.  """

summary: "Can't delete Portal - Site Management is currently unavailable.  "
description: """This bug is an extension of this forum post;  [Can not delete Portal - Site Management is currently unavailable.  |http://www.dnnsoftware.com/forums/threadid/529785/scope/posts/threadpage/1]    When you try to delete a Portal via the Host -> Site Management area you get an error message.        I've experienced this on both fresh DNN 8.0.4 installations and DNN 7.4.2 upgraded to 8.0.4 installations.    # Create a folder path such as D:\websites\Client\DNN.  # Remove all permissions from the D:\ drive except for SYSTEM and Admin permissions.  # Give the D:\websites\Client\DNN the needed permissions for DNN to run IUSR & IIS AppPool\DNN with write/modify/read/etc.  # Install DNN into the DNN folder.  # Create an additional Portal or import another Portal through an exported template.  # Attempt to delete the extra Portal and you should get the error.    As discussed in the thread linked adding the Everyone Full Control to the D:\websites\Client\DNN folder does not resolve the issue.  You still get a permission denied error.    Using the ProcessMonitor tool I watched what the IIS AppPool\DNN user was doing and saw that it was making a read/write/modify request to the D:\websites\Client folder.  If you then give the Everyone (or IUSR & IIS AppPool\DNN) user Full Control of the D:\websites\Client folder you can now successfully delete the Portal.  """
comments: "This also an error in DNN 9... no fix or workaround???" [SEP] "The last sentence of my bug report is the workaround."

summary: "I/E: Retain Extension Packages"
description: """In order to simplify the export/import of a site, extension packages need to be included as part of a site export (if things have been installed since the last export). Most likely, this means we will need to keep copies of the originally installed zip packages after a successful installation (we cannot depend on the built-in packaging because it doesn't necessarily replicate how an extension was packaged).     We need to ensure that when doing so, we are saving them in a new folder with the .resources extension applied to them (to ensure outside users cannot directly download these files). It may be best to make an """"Export"""" folder in the site root and store the packages here (like we do for install).     Note: There will be no UI for this story or anywhere we list the actual saved packages in the UI. Verification by QA for this story may require viewing the file system of the site in the noted folder for the zip files. """

summary: "Module name in search results/settings could not be customized if module definition name contains invalid characters"
description: """The `DotNetNuke.Services.Search.Internals.InternalSearchControllerImpl` uses raw module definition name to generate resource key to get custom (localized) module name from `~/DesktopModules/Admin/SearchResults/App_LocalResources/SearchableModules.resx`. In case when module definition contains some invalid characters (primarily, dots) for resource key, getting custom module name will fail and module definition's friendly name will be used instead.    Example of  `SearchableModules.resx` content:        The issue could be resolved on per-module basis by updating module definition names - but this may not work for some third-party modules as their code could depend on specific definition names.    Ugly quickfix: replace invalid chars (dots, again) in definition name with underscore in `InternalSearchControllerImpl.cs`:    {code:csharp}  var text = Localization.Localization.GetSafeJSString(""""Module_"""" + def.DefinitionName.Replace (""""."""", """"_""""), LocalizedResxFile);  if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text))  {     text = def.FriendlyName;  }  {code}    A generic solution will require using something like `StronglyTypedResourceBuilder.VerifyResourceName()`: https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/ms145952(v=vs.110).aspx Another way - implement check for invalid characters in module definition name then module added/installed.      """
comments: "[~accountid:<USER> - can you please provide a practical implication for why this enhancement is useful? Thank you." [SEP] "In its current state, platform allows to create modules with definition names what could cause problems later on if used as resource keys for SearchableModules.resx. So any way to fix or avoid this should be useful.    Personally, I'd like to name my modules (and definitions) using dot-separated notation (like namespaces or classes) - and this is how I discovered the issue.     Updating module definition to ""correct one"" by providing new module version could be done, but in somewhat hacky way:    1. Installer will create additional module definition from manifest with a new (corrected) name.  2. Newly added definition should be removed from ModuleDefinitions table.  3. Old definition name should be updated to new (correct) one in ModuleDefinitions table."

summary: "Do not fail upgrade wizard upgrade when a newer module is already installed"
description: """In some scenarios, a site may have a newer version of a module installed, while the DNN / Evoq upgrade package might contain an older version. This will be true for Security Analyzer. If you have an older DNN / Evoq and applied the latest SA, and then later to a newer DNN / Evoq with older SA, the upgrade process fails half way.     It completely destroys the side.    We need to log a warning and not upgrade the module if it's older.  """

summary: "JWT logout returns empty string"
description: """*+Steps to reproduce:+*  * Install and configure JWT-AUTH with the DNN API (http://www.dnnsoftware.com/docs/administrators/jwt/setup-jwt-for-auth.html)  * use the /login method with the credentials in the body of the request to get a Token (http://mydomain.com/DesktopModules/JwtAuth/API/mobile/login)   * use the /logout method to logout and invalidate the Token (http://mydomain.com/DesktopModules/JwtAuth/API/mobile/logout)  * Examine the response of the logout-request.    *+Expected behaviour:+*  The Response of the logout request should return valid json data, even if the response body is empty - which is the case for a successful logout response.    *+Wrong behaviour:+*  Instead it returns an empty string ("""""""") in the response body  This behaviour causes errors while parsing the response.    *+Also see: http://api.jquery.com/jQuery.ajax/ +*  _""""json"""": Evaluates the response as JSON and returns a JavaScript object. Cross-domain """"json"""" requests are converted to """"jsonp"""" unless the request includes jsonp: false in its request options. {color:red}The JSON data is parsed in a strict manner; any malformed JSON is rejected and a parse error is thrown.{color} As of jQuery 1.9, an empty response is also rejected; {color:red}the server should return a response of null or {} instead. {color}(See json.org for more information on proper JSON formatting.)_"""

summary: "Deleting a Tab will rearrange Tabs in other portals"
description: """STEPS:  1. Create a page on one Portal  2. Move it to the top of the hierarchy  3. Delete the page  4. Empty the Recycle Bin for this Portal    EXPECTED RESULT  The page is deleted and the page order in other portals are not affected    ACTUAL RESULT  Deleting the page affects the page order in other portals    It is important to notice that it will affect pages with a TabOrder greater than the deleted page TabOrder    CODE FIX:    /****** Object:  StoredProcedure [dbo].[DeleteTab]    Script Date: 04/22/2013 07:53:46 ******/  IF  EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[DeleteTab]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC'))  BEGIN   DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[DeleteTab]  END  GO    /****** Object:  StoredProcedure [dbo].[DeleteTab]    Script Date: 15/02/2017 08:47:09 ******/  SET ANSI_NULLS ON  GO  SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON  GO    CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[DeleteTab]      @TabId Int  -- ID of tab to delete; Not Null and > 0  AS  BEGIN      DECLARE @PortalID Int      DECLARE @TabOrder Int      DECLARE @ParentId Int      DECLARE @ContentItemId Int      SELECT @PortalID = PortalID, @TabOrder = TabOrder, @ParentId = ParentID, @ContentItemID = ContentItemID FROM dbo.[Tabs] WHERE TabID = @TabId        -- Delete Tab --      DELETE FROM dbo.[Tabs] WHERE  TabID = @TabId        -- Update TabOrder of remaining Tabs --      UPDATE dbo.[Tabs]          SET TabOrder = TabOrder - 2          WHERE IsNull(ParentID, -1) = IsNull(@ParentId , -1) AND TabOrder > @TabOrder AND (@PortalID IS NULL OR PortalID = @PortalID)        -- Delete Content Item --      DELETE FROM dbo.[ContentItems] WHERE ContentItemID = @ContentItemId  END  GO"""

summary: "SI: Emptying Recycle Bin kicks off workflow on pages with formerly deleted modules"
description: """Brief Description of Issue:  You have this page where you deleted a module. The module is in the recycle bin and the page goes through its workflow.    After the page has gone through the workflow and been published, actions on the recycle bin should have no affect on the page where the module used to be. Only if the module were restored should the page workflow be invoked.    Clear Steps to Reproduce:  1) Add a module  2) Publish the page  3) Edit page again and remove the module from the page  4) In another tab, delete the module from the Recycle bin  5) Go back to the page click Reject > then Discard  6) This would cause an """"Object reference not set to an instance of an object"""" error. Please take a look at the attached screenshot.    Actual Result:  An """"Object reference not set to an instance of an object"""" error.     Expected Result:  After the page has gone through the workflow and been published, actions on the recycle bin should have no affect on the page where the module used to be. Only if the module were restored should the page workflow be invoked."""

summary: "SI: Persona Bar - Add Page has unneeded redirect rule added"
description: """When a page is added via the persona bar, it gets placed at the root level initially. Then after it is dragged to its intended location via the UI, a 301 redirect is created in the TabURLs table.    This redirection is not needed, as the page doesn't actually ever need to exist at the root level. It also impacts creating future pages with the same name, even if they are going to end up somewhere else entirely.    Steps to reproduce:    1. Open database and SELECT * FROM Tabs  2. Login to site and Add Page via Persona Bar  3. While the page is floating there, run the SQL query again and note that the page has already been created in the database at the root level. Note the tabid.  4. Drag the page to another location, as a child page of an existing page.  5. Check the TabURLs table for the tabid    Expected Result, there should not be any results    Actual Result, there is a 301 from the root level page name."""

Module Permissions:  * HOST user will have permission to select any site to Export/Import   * ADMIN user will only see the site(s) they have access to manage    The system will record Imports and Exports as _separate_ logs, each with their own time stamp and summary. The full import/export log will be represented on the Import / Export feature page exposed via a user interface that is similar to admin logs in terms of display and behavior that only displays the imports and exports that were logged.      * There will be 3 filter options: All Imports and Exports, All Imports, All Exports.   * There will be 5 columns: Date, Log type, Username, Site Name and Status (successful, failed, submitted, cancelled)  * Clicking into each will expand the log and display the summary    See mockups for additional information."""

summary: "I/E: Site Export"
description: """As a Host or Admin user, I want the ability to select portions of my site or my whole site, and export that as a .zip package for use in any other DNN site--for the purpose of creating new sites or moving from staging to production site. As much as we can, on behalf of the exporting user, we want to include all dependencies they will need for the content they are exporting (extension packages, for example). This functionality will be exposed in a new menu item under the Persona Bar > Settings area. Host users will also be able to get to this area via the Sites area within the persona bar (to export a specific site).     As a user selects options and then progress through the export process, they need to be presented with visual feedback letting them know what is occurring as they progress; including display of any warnings and errors identified as part of the export process.     *PERMISSION*  Admin and Host user have access to this functionality. The Admin user will have the ability to export the contents of only their site; whereas the Host user will be able to export any site.    *WHAT ARE WE EXPORTING*  Existing:  * Content - HTML, Content Types, Content Items and Visualizers  * Files  * Roles  * Profile Properties  * Pages (pick list with option to select/de-select all with a single click)    New:  * Users (each user's membership information: username, password, email, )  * * User profile property values (if users are selected AND profile properties)  * Extension packages (No UI)  ** Modules/Providers/Themes/Language Packs  ** Folder permissions  * HTML Provider Configuration (No UI)  * Vocabularies  * URL's and redirects (No UI)  ** Any AUM settings (site level), any page level redirects  * Evoq page templates (No UI)  * Evoq Connector Data (most of this is probably under portal settings)  * All Portal Settings data (any property from the table should automatically)  ** Anything related to portal alias data will not be included  * All Page Settings not currently included, per page  ** This should include any page header, scripts, etc. seen via the page settings UI    *ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA*  Upon Export, a .zip package should be created that installs into any other like-versioned DNN site (also log the export in the admin logs under a new log type for export). Import will be handled in a separate story.     FEEDBACK FROM SPRINT REVIEW:  * Remove field names (Template Name becomes Name)  * No difference between Platform and Evoq modules - take out the home page thumbnail  * Needs to be a warning in the UI when exporting *encrypted passwords* because they likely won't come with.  *Future Enhancement: restrict export job to one server."""

summary: "SI: File moving not transactional, doesn't rollback from error"
description: """Please see linked issue.    """"[...] we moved one our top level folders, it has numerous sub folders that probably go 4 or 5 levels deep. The end user wanted to change the name of the top level folder from """"Planning"""" to """"Planning & Building"""".     The end user used the move function and at some point she received an error stating that the folder couldn't be created because the length of the path was too long. I believe this is a windows limitation.     The underlying issue is really that the process is not transactional, meaning that if it fails it doesn't [roll] back. It started the process of moving files and folders and when it encountered the error it just halted. Leaving the system in a state where most of the files had been moved but not all.     Further my guess is that the system is updated to look at the new folders that were created from the move when the process completes successfully and because it did not complete successfully the system was not aware of the new folders hence to the end user it looked like the files were gone""""    This can be worked around by re-syncing the folders, but the client would like the errors to be handled more gracefully"""

summary: "Site Import / Export"
description: """Content Staging is an Enterprise CMS feature that DNN is currently missing. To potentially get to content staging, we're starting with whole-site Import / Export. This will be a stand alone module in Persona Bar > Settings. This may require iPortable v2 and microservices multi-tenant capability. The target content for export is that generated as part of the CMS. Modules that are predominately site visitor/user driven content typically won't take part in this process (Engage modules like Answers, Discussions, Ideas, etc.).     *PERMISSION*  Admin and Host user will have access to this functionality, however Admin will have access only to their own site.    *WHAT ARE WE EXPORTING*  Existing:  * Content  * Files  * Roles  * Profile Properties  * Pages (pick list with option to select/de-select all with a single click)    New:  * Users (each user's membership information: username, password, email, )  * * User profile property values (if users are selected AND profile properties)  * Extension packages (No UI)  ** Modules/Providers/Themes/Language Packs  ** Folder permissions  * HTML Provider Configuration (No UI)  * Vocabularies  * URL's and redirects (No UI)  ** Any AUM settings (site level), any page level redirects  * Evoq page templates (No UI)  * Evoq Connector Data (most of this is probably under portal settings)  * All Portal Settings data (any property from the table should automatically)  ** Anything related to portal alias data will *not* be included  * All Page Settings not currently included, per page  ** This should include any page header, scripts, etc. seen via the page settings UI    *NOT IN SCOPE*  * Page version history  * Asset version history  * Transfer files to production  * Direct site-to-site connection  * Continuous integration  * Analytics data   * Workflow   * Community Module Content (Engage module content, for example)  * Mechanics Activity, Scoring Action or Privilege point data  * Portal Alias data    *EXPORT / IMPORT STEPS*  * Export: The export wizard will involve most of the decision points, in order to produce a final package that is universally accepted and standardized for DNN sites.  * Import: Import should involve less decisions, run without exception, and be a very painless process    *TESTING NOTES*  Upon Export, a .zip package should be created that installs into any other DNN site with similar versions.  """

summary: "Provide support for Let's Encrypt ACME URLs (Automatic Certificate Management Environment)"
description: """Let's Encrypt provides an automated process to get and renew SSL certificates. One part in this process is the [Automated Certificate Management Environment (ACME)|https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Automated_Certificate_Management_Environment] which uses URLs like this:  https://domain.com/.well-known/acme-challenge/evaGxfADs6pSRb2LAv9IZf17Dt3juxGJ-PCt92wr-oA  By default this URL-Schema is handled by DNN and returns a 404 error page, even if the files actually exist on the file system. DNN should not handle such URL-Requests.    A possible workaround might be to set/adapt the setting _AUM_UrlsWithNoExtensionRegex_ in the Database like this:    """

summary: "PB General: PersonbarPanel settings should be valid and limited to a session only"
description: """Today, when we open a personabar tab in a browser and refresh the page, the same tab opens. The same behavior is persisted even if we login into a separate browsers or if user logout and login again.     This happens because the usersettings are stored into database but this makes editing experience very annoying. Suppose you are making changes into a Content Item or changes permissions for pages/Creating new pages and want to preview the changes live on a difference screen. With current scenario, this won't be possible since the personabartab opens again on the other screen and it has to be closed manually, which is not good experience for a user who is doing 1000 edits and each time closing/opening tab.    Suggestion: The current open tab should be limited by the logged in session only and it should no be persisted when re-login. Moreover, it should be possible to login to separate browser without remembering the tabs from some other browsers."""

summary: "PB General: Folder Picker - Portal Localization LogoFile & BackgroundFile Columns Not long enough"
description: """When working with complex file systems, long file names, or third-party file management solutions it easily possible to exceed the file name length parameters of the PortalLocalization table that only allows 50 characters for file names.  (Logo & Background).    This limitation results in broken background/logo images, and no discernable warning to the user or information regarding what happens.  The skin simply appears to be broken.    *Recreation Steps*    This can be recreated with a default DNN Platform installation.  Simply create a new folder structure that will result in the end being more than 50 charaters.    My example I created the following folder structure    /Images/Shared/SiteLayoutImages/SkinAssets    This is 42 characters in length.    I then added a file to the SkinAssets folder called """"ContosoUniversityLogo.png"""" for a total of 25 characters.    From """"Settings"""" -> """"Site Settings"""" select the file above as your logo file and save.  It will appear to have saved successfully.  Refresh the content page and notice the logo disappears.     Return to """"Settings"""" -> """"Site Settings"""" and notice that you will not see a logo image stored.    Expected behavior would be for this to work.  """

summary: "MVC Settings page restores previous settings right after modifying them"
description: """In a quite simple MVC module, I have an MVC Settings page. In DNN 8.0.2 this works just fine.  In 8.0.4 (and above), however, the settings that are loaded when you open the module settings page, are restored, right after you have changed them, except when they do not exist.  I haven't doublechecked, but it seems to work fine the first time around (so when the modulesettings need to be created upon saving the settings page).  After that:  Using debug mode, I have verified that:  * Settings are stored in the database  * Settings are still updated in the database when the SettingsController is finished  * After that, but before reloading the page with the module on it, the old settings get stored back in the database.  * Even when I change the SettingsController to redirect to a completely different website after saving, the settings are being restored.  * It doesn't matter wether you use SettingsRepository<T> or the old way through the ModuleController.    Tested on 9.0.1 and the same thing happens there too."""
comments: "Hi [~accountid:<USER>, I am not sure how your module settings look like but when I install the sample module from https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform.Samples.Mvc/blob/master/Website/Install/Module/DNN_ContactList_Mvc_01.00.01_Install.zip, the settings looks fine to me. Can you check it and try if you are able to follow the setting section from it?" [SEP] "Hi @<USER> i tried that samplke module and indeed it worked fine.  I dove deeper to see what was going on. The closest I got was this:    in DotNetNuke.Web.Mvc.MvcSettingsControl there is this method being called:        Before ExecuteModule is called, the setting in the database is still correct (so it has my newly updated value), but after that, and before calling UpdateModule, it is set back to my old value.    I looked at the differences between the 2 modules and noticed that my action for the Settings is called Settings, and ""yours"" is called Index.  So, I renemed the action (both get and post) to Index, and *now it works*.    The only strang

summary: "User Profile is not maintained when promoting user"
description: """If a user with profile data is elevated to a super user, the profile data is not migrated with the user.  If the user is demoted from super user, the profile data will return.    h2. Repro Steps  1. Create a new user  2. Add several bits of profile data (middle name, bio, photo)  3. From the Users page, make that user a Super User  4. Login as the new super user  5. View the super user's profile    h2. Expected  1. All of the profile data entered for this user should still be associated with the super user.    h2. Actual  1. All profile data for the super user is empty.  2. If I demote the super user to a regular user, all of their profile data is restored.    This is likely caused because the portal information is not updated in the profile tables for the user when they are elevated.  Conversely, it will need to be updated as well if they are demoted."""
comments: "this is a general issue, how superusers are treated.    My suggestion:  * let us create userportal records for superusers in each website, like any other user. This way, vw_users could use (faster) inner joins and provide site specific information for superusers as well.  * superusers would get same profile as any other user.  * we should add a ""synch user profile"" option per website. if this option is enabled, userprofile values should be synched across all other websites with ""synch user profile"" option enables, where profile property name and datatype is the same.    This way, superusers are identified by isSuperuser flag only and distinguish from other users only by different permissions.  "

summary: "Cannot open modal popup in IE if page URL contains Unicode characters"
description: """Trying to open modal popup in IE if page URL contains Unicode characters results in HTTP 404 error.    Steps to reproduce (using SecurityRoles module as an example):    - Add new page with Unicode name or update URL of existing page  by adding some Unicode characters into it.  - Add SecurityRoles module to the page.  - Click edit button for any role or a Add New Role / Add New Role Group buttons.  - The modal window will pop up with HTTP 404 error.    Tested in IE versions 10, 11.    The issue makes any module, which use modal popups in view controls, unusable from IE if page URL contains Unicode characters. In order to work in IE, the module should not use the edit URLs, returned by `EditUrl()`, but need to use raw URLs like this one: `javascript:dnnModal.show('http://dnn8.local/default.aspx?tabid=101&ctl=Edit&mid=381&RoleID=0&popUp=true',/*showReturn*/false,550,950,true,'')`"""
comments: "Tested in Edge - looks OK."

When logged in as super user this issue is not present.    In summary:    MVC, DNN popup theme and Non administrator: the above mentioned problem occurs. summary: "API: Duplicated API names in different namespaces and serve different purpose. "
description: """We shall naming the api calls with its purpose and its location (Namespaces)    For instance, GetPortals, we have 4 GetPortals across the Dnn libraries.    !image-2017-01-19-13-27-07-549.png|width=650!    Each of them has different parameters and different return values. Which one I supposed to use, would be a question difficult to answer.     Suggestion: Name it properly and eliminate duplications.   For instance,    Dnn.PersonaBar.UI Dnn.PersonaBar.UI.Services.Portals *GetPortals* *Boolean addAll*    It supposed to return a list of portals with their ID and Name, I will recommend to use name like: GetPortalList.     More, finally I figured out this API actually served purpose to generate the dropdown list on UI   !image-2017-01-19-13-38-39-484.png|width=380!  with """"addAll"""" equal to true, it will put """"All Sites"""" option in the dropdown.     Design with too many conditions applied I will say. I will recommend to use api only for data supply purpose, no UI logic.      """

summary: "Extension URL provider break when English default culture is disabled"
description: """Add another language under *Admin > Languages* (e.g. fr-FR) and make French the default site language. Then disable (uncheck) the en-US language.    The extension URL provider passes an empty cultureCode in the *TransformFriendlyUrlToQueryString* method. However, the *ChangeFriendlyUrl* method receives the correct cultureCode = fr-FR.    We cannot use the *System.Threading.Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture* or *System.Threading.Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentUICulture* either as it returns en-US, but we really needed fr-FR.    This bug is breaking the advanced URL extension since it's unable to lookup the correct URL path to recreate the query string values."""

summary: "Make Persona Bar UserSetting free of Evoq parameter in platform and extensible"
description: """https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.AdminExperience.Library/blob/development/src/Dnn.PersonaBar.Library/DTO/UserSettings.cs    Persona Bar user settings is a mechanism to store server side the user preference for the persona bar consume then in the UI.     These settings are used to store the latest panel open, if the panel was open, the latest query for analytics, etc… So the next time the user comes to the Persona bar will find the same setup, its preferences in place.    *Issue*  # The current implementation makes use of a Fixed Schema Entity Object (not extensible)  # The current implementation expose settings used only in Evoq  ** Some of these properties make sense for a product independent Persona Bar (i.e.: Expand PersonaBar, Active Path, Active Identifier), but other are fixed to feature in Evoq (i.e.: endDate, comparativeTerm, period, legends, expandTasks).    The goal of this improvement is remove any Evoq specific parameters and make the system extensible so other panels could take the benefit of this mechanism (starting with Evoq params).    *Note for DEV*: we have to consider if the new system is backward compatible, in case some third party could potencially using the old settings (however, I do not think will be the case as these are fixed and used already in specific area).  """

Bucks County in Pennsylvania) the List Name appears as State.PA.County when it should be just County.  If the entries are corrected directly in the database the table is structured properly; however, the hierarchical list to the left still does not operate properly, only allowing list expansion at level 0.  We tried to recreate our own State list entry in the List module.  Because of the module’s logic error in identifying List Name this was not possible.    We have clients that require county level identification resulting in our inability to migrate to more recent versions without installing our own list module.      """

summary: "SI: maxInvalidPasswordAttempts is partially locking user"
description: """Brief Description of Issue:  User created a function that allows staff to programmatically Reset Password instead of getting locked out. However their code is not working since DNN is partially locking the user before they reach the max attempts.    *Here is their comment:*  DNN is partially locking out the borrower on the 5th attempt(default without the maxInvalidPasswordAttempts). If I set the maxInvalidPasswordAttempts to 4 it still only partially locks the user on the 4th attempt.    If you try to programmatically ResetPassword there is an exception that the user is locked out, but when you look at the account IN DNN the account does not say that it is locked out and has a strange Last Lockout Date in the Database. In addition if you programmatically look at Membership.LockedOut for that user it shows false. It’s not until the user tries the next attempt at a password and fails does it FULLY get locked out.    In your sample of changing it to 4. Try to login 4 times only with the wrong password. Then login as an admin and look at the account. It does not show as being locked out…until you update that account or they try on the 5th attempt.    *We have a function that allows our staff to programmatically ResetPassword. This fails because they are partially locked out*. In the code we check the Membership.LockedOut. If it is true then we unlock the user before the ResetPassword. If it is false we do not unlock the user. In this case it showing false so the unlock code is skipped, and the ResetPassword is attempted and gets an exception because the it says that the user is locked out. Seems to me that there is a flaw in the DNN code that sets the user as locked out or the Membership.LockedOut is showing an incorrect status(false when it should be true).    *Here is a snippet of that code:*    Dim dnnUser As Entities.Users.UserInfo = MembershipProvider.Instance.GetUserByUserName(PortalId, ltUserName.Text)    Dim aspUser As MembershipUser = System.Web.Security.Membership.Providers(""""AspNetSqlMembershipProviderAdmin"""").GetUser(ltUserName.Text, False)    If dnnUser.Membership.LockedOut Then    MembershipProvider.Instance.UnLockUser(dnnUser)    End If    Dim newPassword As String = aspUser.ResetPassword()    The LockedOut is False and the ResetPassword throws an exception that says it is locked out.    Again this only occurs if the user does not go beyond the maxInvalidPasswordAttempts and calls us to reset their account password."""
comments: "From the customer:    Attached the install of the code. The issue occurs when a user fails the password attempts to the exact amount. Either 5 as the default or what ever is set in the web.config. If they do no more, our staff has the ability to change the password and it gets emailed to the user. The issue comes in where the code check to see if the user is locked or not. It comes back false. If it came back true the code would unlock the user before the password reset. Since it is false we go into the code that resets the password, but it exceptions out indicating that the user is locked.    [^ACPE_Acpe Password Management_01.02.02_Install.zip] " [SEP] "From customer:    Our patch fix of the code was to remove the if Membership.LockedOut check before unlocking the user before the password reset. So we will ALWAYS unlock the user(regardless if they are locked or not) before doing the reset password. This seems to work." [SEP] "Then mentioned problem was solved in   https://dnntracker.atlassian.net/browse/DN

summary: "tabUrl included in page template"
description: """When exporting a page as a template the tabUrls are included in the template XML. This creates a problem when a new page is created using that template. An entry is created in the TabUrls table that specifies the new TabId and the Url from the page that the template was created from. This will then cause the site to start logging a large number errors in the EventLog table.    When exporting the page to a template there is no way to prevent the urls from being included. Likewise, when creating a new page using that template there is no indication that the additional """"duplicate"""" urls have been added to the TabUrls table."""
comments: "We are re-doing the site import/export as part of Platform 9.1 and URL's being included (301's due to deletion) are meant to come over (provided you have include deletions) at the page level. "

summary: "Files do not become overwritten in CKEditor"
description: """When you check the checkbox labeled """"Override File If Exists on Upload, Otherwise a New File With Underscore _1 Will Be Created"""" and upload a file with the same name, a new file will always be created with a _1 at the end and never be overwritten.    Verbatim from client    """"We're using CKEditor with CKFinder for the file browser. In the HTML Editor configuration, in the File Browser Settings tab, there is a checkbox for """"Override File If Exists on Upload, Otherwise a New File With Underscore _1 Will Be Created:"""" which we have marked. When we don't mark the box, uploads of the same file get _1 added to the end of the filename. When we mark the box to override on upload, uploads of the same file get (1) added to the end. We want to override (overwrite) by default. Giving the user a confirmation dialog would be even better."""""""

summary: "SI: HTTPS request to the root page of a child site in SSL offloading installation causes endless redirections"
description: """Steps to reproduce:  - Create SSL offloading environemtn with 1 load balancer and 1 server with 1 DNN site  - Set the SSL offloading header as required by the load balancer  - Create a child site (say, {{mydomain.com/demo}})  - Enable SSL for the child site  - Set the root page o the child site to {{Secure}}  - Send a request to the load-balancer in the form of (_notice the backslash at the end of the URL_): {{https://mydomain.com/demo/}}    Notice that the server receives the request without HTTPS as: {{http://mydomain.com/demo/}}    Actual result:  When the server send the response, it replies with a redirect to this URL:  {{https://mydomain.com/demo/}} *which causes an infinite redirects*.    Expected result:  The server replies with a URL that does not cause infinite redirects."""
