summary: "Multi-language website and page permission settings don't work correctly together"
description: """In a multi-language website, accessing a page in a language other than the default one and the page has permissions set to Registerd Users and the user is not logged in, instead of proposing to Login with the returnurl set to that page, the user is redirected to the entitled page in the default language.    The problem is caused by the following lines in DNN Platform > Library > UI > Skins > Skin.cs - function ProcessMasterModules() - Line 472:    //If request localized page which haven't complete translate yet, redirect to default language version.  var redirectUrl = Globals.AccessDeniedURL(Localization.GetString(""""TabAccess.Error""""));  Locale defaultLocale = LocaleController.Instance.GetDefaultLocale(PortalSettings.PortalId);  if (PortalSettings.ContentLocalizationEnabled &&  TabController.CurrentPage.CultureCode != defaultLocale.Code)  {   redirectUrl = new LanguageTokenReplace { Language = defaultLocale.Code }.ReplaceEnvironmentTokens(""""[URL]"""");  }  Response.Redirect(redirectUrl, true);    The comment line claims that if the page is not translated, user should be redirected to default language version. However the condition is always redirecting to the default language version since the current page culture code will be always different from the default locale if the user is navigating the site in a language either than the default one.  The condition should be:    if (PortalSettings.ContentLocalizationEnabled && !TabController.CurrentPage.IsTranslated)  {   {    // If page is the home page of that language and it is not translated, then a redirect to the default language version should occur    if (TabController.CurrentPage.TabID == PortalSettings.HomeTabId)    {     redirectUrl = new LanguageTokenReplace { Language = defaultLocale.Code }.ReplaceEnvironmentTokens(""""[URL]"""");    }    else    {     // If page is NOT the home page of that language and it is not translated, then a redirect to the parent page IN THAT LANGUAGE should occur     redirectUrl = new LanguageTokenReplace { Language = TabController.CurrentPage.CultureCode }.ReplaceEnvironmentTokens(""""[URL]"""");    }   }  }    This leads to another problem with pages for which the user has view permission (at the beginning of the very same function). In this case if one has view permission but the page is not translated, before continuing displaying the page the skin should check if that user has rights to modify the page (in other words that can translate the page as an Administrator or a Translator) and if not should be redirected to the parent page in the same language or to the default language version if the page is the home page. So the following lines should be added to line 422:    //If request localized page which haven't complete translate yet, redirect to default language version.  var redirectUrl = Globals.AccessDeniedURL(Localization.GetString(""""TabAccess.Error""""));  Locale defaultLocale = LocaleController.Instance.GetDefaultLocale(PortalSettings.PortalId);  if (PortalSettings.ContentLocalizationEnabled && !TabController.CurrentPage.IsTranslated)  {   //Check if user is in a role that can translate this page   if (!TabPermissionController.CanAdminPage() || !TabPermissionController.CanManagePage())   {    if (TabController.CurrentPage.TabID == PortalSettings.HomeTabId)    {     redirectUrl = new LanguageTokenReplace { Language = defaultLocale.Code }.ReplaceEnvironmentTokens(""""[URL]"""");    }    else    {     redirectUrl = new LanguageTokenReplace { Language = TabController.CurrentPage.CultureCode }.ReplaceEnvironmentTokens(""""[URL]"""");    }    Response.Redirect(redirectUrl, true);   }  }    """

summary: "Edit Profile Page's Manage Profile Tab overflows small screens"
description: """The Manage Profile Tab for the Edit Profile page has a few issues that prevent it from rendering well for smaller devices.      1. The profile photo upload panel overflows near 500px and has hard coded widths.  2. The profile photo upload dialog has hard coded C# & js width's & isn't responsive  3. Labels and tooltips mis-aligned or offscreen on small devices  4. If/When used RadEditor overflows (still supported?)      The main CSS file involved is /DesktopModules/Admin/Security/module.css though if using the RadEditor it also involves DesktopModules/Admin/RadEditorProvider/Css/EditorOverride.css (DNN-9151)      File Upload dialog:  /Shared/Components/FileUpload/dnn.FileUpload.js    These js lines are also hard coded and don't override the C# hard coded values being passed in to the dialog without altering the current approach to the dialog:    FileUploadDialog._defaults = {          dialogCss: """"fu-dialog"""",          width: 780,          height: 630      };    This snippet above the dialog prototype call may be a useful staring point for responsive displays:    var fuDialogWidth;      var setFileUploadDialogWidth = function () {          var fuScreenWidth = $(window).width(); summary: "Creating new user creates many empty profile entries "
description: """When a new user is created there are 23 profile rows created in the {{UserProfile}} table with most of them having empty {{PropertyValue}}. This is a waste of database space and inefficient in terms of database operations and needs to be optimized by not creating the rows with empty values in the first place.    A further enhancement is to delete these already existing rows with empty values."""
comments: "We need to be very carefully handling this, due to DNN using an empty string internally as Null value.  With profile properties, we need to distinguish between a non-set value (in this case, we may use the default) or an intentionally empty string. Consider default for a custom property Profession is ""enter your profession"", a user might empty this, to indicate he doesn't want his profession being stored.  The code behind might decide, whether the text has not been provided or is intentionally empty.  Besides, it is usually easier to handle records with missing values than deciding whether to use the value, an empty string or the default value, especially in the database. Be also aware that inner joins usually perform faster than left joins.  If we want to optimize user profile, I would alter PropertyValue to nVarChar and remove PropertyText column." [SEP] "https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1605  https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1606" [SEP] "PR merged, change is available in

summary: "Persona Bar should load immediately and not wait for page ready"
description: """The new persona bar in DNN9 currently loads after the page has finished loading. This causes the page to shift each time causing a very unpleasant user experience. The persona bar should load before the page is rendered. If that's not possible, it should at least reserve the area to the left hand side so that page won't shift/move and only load the persona content at the end. Also, I hope to see icons put in the persona bar and not text links the way it is now. :)"""
comments: "Is page shift really a big concern?" [SEP] "I think it is, if we're concerned about great usability and performance. As a content editor, you're navigating from page to page making lots of quick text edits, but not necessarily using the persona bar (so the eye is focused on the content, not the persona bar). Power users want to anticipate and move the mouse to an area to edit before the page is fully loaded, but cannot knowing the page is about to shift by an inch to the side on every load. After a few times missing the area, the mind naturally feels the urge to wait for the page to stabilize before editing, slowing down the fast edit experience." [SEP] "I'm not sure why this is closed without an explanation. Today someone else is complaining about it in the forum and I think DNN should pay attention. summary: "SI: Display Tags without ASCII Codes"
description: """    When a tag that includes a non standard/extended ASCII character is added to a Taxonomy, how it displays varies.    - The extended character is converted to a ASCII code when it is entered into the Taxonomy    - When adding the tag to a page, the extended character is rendered in the tag in the list of selectable keywords, but the ASCII code is shown in the list of tags added to the page directly below the keywords    - You can use the keyword with the rendered character to search by tag. The tag is displayed in the search input with the character rendered and the list of tags on each search result shows the character rendered. The tag as included in the content snipped of the search results shows the ASCII code instead."""
comments: "Please review this PR: https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1622    QA testers: you need to look into the Zendesk ticket for images explaining the issue further." summary: "SI: Cannot Edit Custom Login Page When Redirect Enabled"
description: """If a custom login page is created and the Redirect After Login is set to something other than None Specified, the Custom Login page cannot be editited. This is becasue a logged in user is redirected as soon as they load the page.    Steps to Reproduce  -Create Custom Login Page  - Set as default login page in Site Settings > Advanced Settings > Page Management   - Select page to redirect to another page after login using Site Settings > User Account Settings > Login Settings > Redirect After Login  - Login as a user with edit rights (Admin or Host for example)    Result: unable to enter edit mode on the custom login page as any attempt to load said page redirects as per the setting."""

summary: "Child portal is broken when created under virtual directory application"
description: """Steps to reproduce:  1. Create a website in virtual directory. (http://localhost/dnnsite)  2. Login to the website as host and in persona bar open manage->sites  3. Click on add new site.  4. Enter title (child) and description and select Directory.  5. Click on Create Site.  6. After the site is created the UI redirects to the portals list. Click on the View Site icon of the newly created website.  Expected:   The child portal is opened  Actual:  404 is thrown    Reason:  The UI is sending just the first section of the website path for creating the child portal. In this case UI sends the portal alias as """"localhost/child"""" but it is supposed to be """"localhost/dnnsite/child"""".      There is workaround to this issue is to manually change the Directory path before hitting create new site button.  """

Using NOLOCk is a bad practice that should be avoided. Therefore, there is a need to review the design of all these views to prevent deadlocks from occurring. The views are:  - vw_Files  - vw_Portals  - vw_Modules  - vw_Tabs  - vw_TabModules    And the following functions / stored procedures:  - FilePath  - GetRolesBasicSearch      """

summary: "PurgeScheduleHistory stored procedure timesout"
description: """The PurgeScheduleHistory task uses the PurgeScheduleHistory stored procedure to clean up the old schedule runs logs. After a while of disabling this scheduler and enabling it again, the history file contains too many records that the procedure will not be able to complete in 30 seconds and times out. There is a need optimize this stored procedure for faster processing and to avoid timeouts."""
comments: " PR => https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1607    I added minor changes to the procedure and reduced the amount of batch from 50K to 5K records deleted at a time. This is because in Engage we produce between 800 to 1000 entries per hour and the job frequency is once per hour so this should be enough to pickup after being disabled for a short while. If needed the frequency can be increased on a site by site basis.    I did some profiling using SQL Server 2016 with the new changes as in the attached imagesfor a site with 20450 schedule history records. The 50K image shows that the joins create over 31 million rows at some point while the 5K a join with about 9 million rows. Besides total time to delete 50K is way more than 5K." [SEP] "Hello [~accountid:<USER>    We're still getting timeout exception and here the logs from log4net file :        The above timeout issue will be fixed on 9.0.1 #74   " [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER>, I resolved DNN-9174 in which I added 90 seconds timeout for this procedur

summary: """Redirected too many times"" errors when making the Home page private"
description: """1. Logon as a Host  2. Allow content localization on Host Settings.  3. Ensure you have installed more than one language.  4. Add a new child Site from the Default Webite template  5. Navigate to this new Portal.  6. Navigate to Admin > Languages and click enable Localized Content.  7. Ensure """"Make all pages Translatable"""" is unticked.  8. Click Enable Localized Content.  9. Enable a new language  10. Navigate to Admin > Page Management  11. Make the home page private (visible only for registered users)  12. Create a page and call it Logon. Make it visible for all users.  13. Add the """"Account Login"""" module to this page  14. Navigate to Admin > Settings > Advance Settings and set this page as the Login Page  15. Logout and try browsing the Portal.    EXPECTED RESULT  You are redirected to the Logon page    ACTUAL RESULT  The browser won't display the page (redirected too many times error)    IMPORTANT  At this point you may think that I haven't set the login page as translated and published. However, even doing so it won't work. See below extra steps:    15. Navigate to Admin > Languages  16. Active and publish the second language  17. Set the Login page as Translated and Published on this second language    Also, if you navigate to Admin > Languages > Content Localization tab and you try to make a page translatable (i.e. Home page) it will create an extra page. Navigate to Admin > Pages and you'll see the Home page is duplicated."""

summary: "Resource Key Display Issues"
description: """This  issue was found by our Spanish translator Vicenç Masanasis. When running in Spanish (or other languages rather than English) if a resource key is not translated, instead of using the English default it displays the actual resource key name.  """
comments: "this should expected result, when a resource file is missing, it will load the default resources file instead.    but if some resource key is missing in the localized file, it will show the resource key directly, as localized file shouldn't only localize some of keys, it should contains all of them." [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER> is this how it works in Platform outside of PB. Shouldn't we show English?" [SEP] "Localization works in different way with platform.  platform load it in server side, and will find localized content with fallback calling,so if the key not exist, it will fallback to default language, if not exist in default, will fallbck to shared resources etc.  but in APB, we load the localization content as JSON data into clientside, and resources will find in client side, so it won't get default language content when not exist.  IMO this is not a big deal, as translator should always translate all entries in APB as this is totally all new files. if this really becomes a problem, we can change it in

summary: "SI: Ignore words/users with an '_' in the word"
description: """Brief Description of Issue:  Option to ignore words/users with an '_' in the word    Clear Steps to Reproduce:  1. Create a user with an '_' in it eg. rtj_pageeditor  2. Go to Admin > Search Admin  3. Add user to the Ignore Words section  4. Perform a Re-index of your site by deleting the contents of the App_Data > Search Folder and then Re-index site in the Search Admin page as well as Host Settings > Search Settings  5. Search for rtj_pageeditor  6. User still shows up even though it is one of the words that should be ignored.    Actual Result:  User still shows up even though it is one of the words that should be ignored.    Expected Result:  User should not show up in the Results, and should be Ignored."""
comments: "This is more involving than it seems. The right step to get this working is to add all components of ignored name.  For the above example, there is a need to add all of these as separate words to the ignored words and it will do the job:  - rtj  - pageeditor  - rtj_pageeditor  - <EMAIL>    This is caused by the Lucene Analyzers in use which split the words on punctuation and special characters. We can't change these Analyzer's as they will affect a lot of other search words." [SEP] "based on the above comment the Lucene Analyzers is in used and the Lucene Analyzers cannot be changed , the above issue cannot be fixed. closed the issue as wont fixed"

description: """We should replace the long numbers with user friendly text, e.g. 2345 seconds to 1 day or something similar.     !image-2016-12-03-15-33-43-640.png|thumbnail! """
comments: "[~accountid:<USER>, could you please provide user friendly text for time remaining? thx    something like these?  58 second(s)  2 hour(s) 0 minute(s) 0 second(s)  1 day(s) 0 hour(s) 45 minute(s) 15 second(s)      " [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER> Per Chris, we need to match the pattern established in this Confluence Article:  https://dnntracker.atlassian.net/wiki/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=80912690    In our case,  Anytime a word is used to display a unit:    - Unit = 1: singular  Example: ‘1 minute’    - Unit > 1: plural  If < 1 minute, show ‘less than a minute’  If > 1 minute but < 1 hour = minutes  If > 1 hour but < 24 hours = hours  If > 1 day/24 hours but < 1 month = days" [SEP] "PR submitted, https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.AdminExperience.Extensions/pull/114" [SEP] "Verified in Engage 9.1.1 build 106 -190 and its working fine , Please refer to the screencast: https://www.screencast.com/t/Nkohe4foL"

summary: "PB General: Error in UpdateUserSettings causes PB to not function"
description: """See the attached error. When this happens you cannot any panel. We need to handle this error gracefully. PB should continue to work regardless of what happens to the result of this call, as this call is about settings.   !image-2016-12-03-14-50-51-729.png|width=720! """
comments: "Previously Persona Bar was wating for the call to `UpdateUserSettings` before it opened/closed. If the call failed that action was suppressed.    I changed that code with @francescorivola to be fire and forget. It will not wait for the AJAX call to finish which can mean the PB reacts quicker.    There is no easy to test this because you'd have to simulate a failed status code for UpdateUserSettings. Please regress-test that upon interaction with Persona Bar the user settings are updated." [SEP] "Code review done. It looks good. Merged in build Dnn.AdminExperience.Library #1.5.0.53.    *Note for QA*: in case you want to simulate a failure in the UpdateUserSettings ajax call you could use Fiddler AutoResponder to fake a bad request response (http://docs.telerik.com/fiddler/KnowledgeBase/AutoResponder)" [SEP] "By trapping UpdateUserSettings request via Fiddler filters and breakpoints was able to verify that persona bar works fine even if update user settings requests is not responding or timed out  Verified usi

summary: "PB General: Go back to the specific tab upon refresh"
description: """When you refresh a page with PB on, PB reopens the last open panel. This is great. We need to extend it to remember the specific tab within the panel. In this example, there are 4 tabs:    # Servers Panel  # Server Settings Tab  # Web Server Sub Tab  # Edit on a specific item    Ideally this should be a generic mechanism where an extension can save it's state and also query it upon reload so it can reopen back. This will help Assets, Users, Pages, everything. Right now you have huge navigation to follow when you refresh the page.     !image-2016-12-02-08-20-05-327.png|thumbnail!   """
comments: "DNN-9653: Go back to the specific tab upon refresh.    the implementation behavior are:  1. the tabs selection on multiple modules are supported. such as you select ""Site Behavior > Site Aliases"" in Site Settings, ""Member Accounts > Registration Settings"" in Security, then refresh page, these modules will all keep the tabs selection.  2. the selection will keep after refresh if you click on the mask area or press ESC button, to let PB menu in pending status.  3. the selection will be clear after refresh if you click the ""X"" button to exist PB. summary: "PB Users: Pagination - Enhance pagination with input textbox for page numbers"
description: """In cases where there are dozens, hundreds or thousands of results even showing 250 items per page means there are hundreds of pages of results  This means you have to click an arrow dozens or hundreds of times to get to the result you want... if it's not returned by searching    We should enhance pagination by adding an editable text box that shows which page you're currently on AND that will instantly load any other existing page if it's typed into the text box    IE  There are 40,000 results  That means 160 pages of results @ 250 results/page  In the current implementation that's a lot of clicking ;)    Add an editable text box that shows the current page   Allow numeric characters to be typed in   If page exists when user hits Enter key that page loads  if no page exists simple error message"""
comments: "Thanks Ken. 2 questions:   1) how would the user know to navigate to a particular page? e.g. ""I want to go to page 142."" How would a user know the result he's looking for is on page 142?  2) why isn't search working?"

summary: "SMTP: Only override sender if SmtpAuth is Enabled"
description: """If smtp-username contains an @, it will override the sender of the email. In that case both Sender and From is set in the SMTP header.    Unfortunately this happens also when SMTP authentication is disabled and the textbox for te smtp username is hidden to the host user."""
comments: "https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1575" [SEP] "https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/pull/1882" [SEP] "I reviewed and merged the PR.    The QA for this issue requires an SMTP setting with authentication (Basic or NTLM). This might be hard to test and might require the help of an IT person  for this matter. One case can be verified which is when there is no SMTP authentication and the sender name contains @, the sent email (can be captured with e.g., papercut) will not contain any substitution of the sender address is the sent emails from within DNN."

summary: "Security Analyzer - Check Hidden/System Files"
description: """My site was compromised at some point during Spring 2016. Since that time, I ran the Security Analyzer, removed default host account, removed .aspx from allowable extensions etc.    Today a user accessed a .aspx file which was located in my site and set as RHSA (Read Only, Hidden, System, Archive). This file was overlooked by my visual inspection earlier this year, and also the current Security Analyzer.    The suggested enhancement is to add another section to the Security Analyzer, along side Modified Files, to show files that are marked as Hidden in the website file structure. Hidden files should be an immediate red flag, however many users might not think to look for them."""
comments: "DNN-9017: add hidden system files check." [SEP] "Verified in Platform 9 build 790  Content 9 build 570  Engage 9 build 762"

summary: "SI: CKEditor cursor location on switch to source view"
description: """While editing content with the CKEditor, if the user highlights text then switches to source view, they lose their place in the content. In the basic editor switching to HTML view takes you to the location of text you have highlighted in design view. A client is accustomed to this functionality and is saying how hard it is to find their place in the HTML source.    Here are the steps to reproduce:    1. Go to a page with an HTML module that has a significant amount of content.    2. Put the page in edit mode.    3. Click on the module content to enter simple edit mode. Don’t go into advanced edit mode yet.    4. In the basic editor, scroll down a bit to some content in the middle of the module and highlight some text.    5. Click the toolbar button to go into the HTML source code (still in the basic editor).    6. Note that the text you highlighted in design view is now still highlighted in source code view.    7. Click the toolbar button to go back to design view.    8. Go into advanced edit (CKEditor) mode.    9. Repeat steps 4 and 5 in the advanced editor.    10. Note when you switch to the HTML source code view, your cursor is at the top of the content and the text you highlighted in design view is not highlighted in HTML source view. To find the code you were looking at, you have to be able to decipher the source code or use the browser’s find function, that is _if_ you can remember what the text was and don’t mis-type anything in the search box."""

summary: "Removal of layout mode limits support functionality of the platform"
description: """Removal of the layout mode from a regular user perspective appears to be an overall net """"Gain"""", however, there was one major customer support aspect of the functionality that no longer exists in the platform.    In prior versions of DNN you could enable Layout Mode and then navigate to a page with a module that was throwing exceptions and remove the offending module.  Now, if you have a module that causes certain kinds of exceptions that break rendering of the page your options for removal are more limited.    Is there any possiblity of adding/retaining a functionality to support this?"""
comments: "Mitchel,   I don't believe we will bring this back.  You can still remove the module from Page Settings.  I could see possibly adding a query string parameter option, but I would prefer not to see this introduced in the UI because it has very limited value.    -Will" [SEP] "Will -     I figured that was going to be the argument here, but I wanted to try as there is benefit in environments with un-named modules etc where the placement of the module is helpful to know.    Example Situation:    Page with 15 modules on it, none of those modules have titles to them.  You add a new module with a blank title, it is at the bottom of the Content Pane, and it blows up entirely.    In this case the Modules list in the page settings doesn't help as I cannot target it directly.      A querystring personally, that was a hidden support feature would be awesome.  As I know the framework underneath still supports it." [SEP] "We will add the ability to access layout mode via query string in the next release.    -Will"

summary: "DNN Version Upgrade fails on some NAS-Filesystems that don't have alphabetically file-lists"
description: """During a DNN version-upgrade multiple SQL-scripts are executed. The order of these scripts is defined by the filenames, like _08.00.00.01.SqlDataProvider_, _08.00.00.02.SqlDataProvider_ and so on. So the list of files must be sorted alphabetically. Most file-system provide the list of files in an alphabetical sort-order by default but some don't (like a NAS running on linux/unix). On such a file-system the DNN version upgrade runs the SQL-scripts in an invalid order and crashes!    We're currently having this issue on multiple QNAP-NAS. QNAP has made a feature request to provide the possibility of presorted-filelist by default but this will also affect the performance in a negative way. Currently we have no working solution and probably other linux/unix systems/NAS may be also affected by this issue.    The list of the upgrade-scripts is defined in https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/blob/development/DNN%20Platform/Library/Services/Upgrade/Upgrade.cs#L4216 and uses      Microsoft explicit writes in the documencation: """"*The order of the returned file names is not guaranteed; use the Sort method if a specific sort order is required.*""""    h2. So the solution is simple:    *Line 4463: add this (inside GetUpgradeScripts()):*      *Change Line 4520 to 4523 to this (inside AddAvailableIncrementalFiles()):*      We tested this solution successfully on DNN 8.0.4.226."""
comments: "Issue title should have ""... alphabetically file-lists"" at the end." [SEP] "Change looks good, PR merged. Change is available in platform build# 9.1.1.109." [SEP] "To QA, it's a dev task and no QA is needed. Please go ahead and close this jira. Thx" [SEP] "Closing this JIRA as Dev task!"

summary: """?PortalID=X"" appends to end of URL if login after timeout"
description: """It appears that ?PortalID=X is appended to any URL of a link clicked on after login (if the login is due to sitting idle and expiring).  This is a problem if there are query strings for this link as the ?PortalID=X will be part of the last query string.     Example: Lets say I have a list of people that will link to a detailed page when you click on a person.  Lets say each link looks like: /People/PersonDetail/mid/1294?ID=123456.  If I click on one of the links after my login expires, naturally I will be redirected to a login page.  This page will have a URL that reads: https://www.hostname.com/login?returnurl=/People/PersonDetail/mid/1294?ID=123456?portalid=2.  As you can see in the returnurl parameter, the ?portalid=2 is appended after the query strings.  Of course after logon, the system redirects me to the /People/PersonDetail/mid/1294 page and I get an error because ID 123456?portalid=2 does not exist."""
comments: " In 9, we removed the concept of host pages (upgrades could still have these pages) and portalid isn't appended to the querystring now.  "

summary: "Autocompete country field fails to populate profie with country ID"
description: """If one enables the country field in the registration form, then when a user first views the form, the country field is pre-populated with a country, normally the correct one... possibly detected by browser locale or something.    If the user submits the form without modifying that country, then the profile table will be populated with the literal country name and not the country ID... and this is not correct.    Only if the user clicks into the country field, clears it and then begins typing and then selects a suggested country, then the profile table will get the country ID and not the name.    I have also found this to occur when the country field is not enabled in the form. The profile field in the database will be populated with the detected but invisible, literal country name.    There is a related issue with the Region field.     If one also enables the Region field on the registration form and makes it a required field, it is not possible to populate the field until after first auto-populating the country field with a valid country. Only then does the region field switch to a dropdown and become operable. By default however, the region is above the country and people typically try typing the region first, especially if the field is a text box that accepts input. Suggest making the Region field inactive until a valid country has been selected and move it below the country by default.     Note that connecting these fields like this also makes it impossible to only have a region and not a country field. If only the region is enabled, and this is not an unknown scenario for a site that only operates in a particular country, then it is not possible to submit the form as it will not accept any input.. because it requires that a country be selected first.    Use of conventional dropdowns and ensuring the country field is not pre-populated would resolve all of this... the way it was in the past didn't seem to cause any trouble."""

description: """As a Host or Admin: I need the ability to """"soft-delete"""" users, then see those users in the Recycle Bin, and ultimately permanently delete or restore them. The Users module should already allow soft delete of users.    This enhancement will be available to both Platform and Evoq versions.    +UX+  * Admin clicks """"Delete User""""  * Admin is prompted to confirm delete and clicks """"yes""""  * A message appears saying the user was sent to the Recycle Bin  * Admin is then able to see the deleted user in the Recycle Bin and either """"restore"""" or """"permanently delete"""" them."""
comments: "Hi [~accountid:<USER>, can you please split this story in 2 (one for users, other for files). Also for files we do not have support for Recycle bin in platform, this will require to modify the platform for support that (are we also going to support folder in recycle bin?)." summary: "Performance of GetModuleByDefinition Impacts DB Server Heavily"
description: """After monitoring database activity on a moderately busy web server, we have found that the GetModuleByDefinition was the single most costly query in the database.  Upon review, this procedure uses a query that joins to vw_modules and then re-joins to the same tables to actually apply a where clause.    By modifying the view to add two columns, we were able to achieve a 900% improvement in performance of this query.  Pull request will be submitted with the full fix, which includes a change to the view and stored procedure."""
comments: "[~accountid:<USER> and [~accountid:<USER> Can we take a look at this for 9.0.1?  [~accountid:<USER> It would be great if you could tell us exactly what you changed.  " [SEP] "@Will @Ash - I'll attach the fix that we have for this.  THe change was adding ""DefinitionNam"" and ""IsModuleDeleted"" to the view and then changing the procedure to use the view.  Improved the SQL Query plan by a massive number.    Let me know if you have questions [^Fix for DNN-8950.txt] " [SEP] "Thanks [~accountid:<USER>, we will have a look and reach out if we have any questions." [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER>, is there a benefit for having the two branches condition    over having one {{WHERE}} statement as this    ???" [SEP] "@<USER>- Yes about 50% of the improvement was by adding the branching in, as it allowed the query engine to select a solid plan.  We did extensive testing both ways, and the final submitted operation was far faster." [SEP] "Modified the related view and stored procedure according to [~accountid:<USER>'s submitt

summary: "TabModule Pane Doesn't Update on Skin Change"
description: """When a skin has a pane that is not the default required ContentPane, it can cause problems for module ordering when the skin on the page is changed.    To reproduce this, add a new module to a page, and put it in a custom pane, example TopHeroDark pane.    Then change the skin on the page to a skin which does not have the TopHeroDark pane.    The module will be located in the ContentPane on the page, but if you look in the database, it still thinks it is in the TopHeroDark pane in the TabModules table.    This can cause problems with module ordering and drag & drop, when you have multiple modules on the page that were in different panes, and they all get lumped into the ContentPane with duplicate ModuleOrder values."""
comments: "this is by design - if you decide to re-apply original skin again afterwards or modify the skin adding a pane with the original name, it will be returned properly.   What might need to be reviewed is order of modules in content pane, I suggest ordering it by pane name and position in pane instead just by position without regarding pane name. "

summary: "JS: getModuleId for drag-drop is buggy in DNN 8.0.4"
description: """The JS API on the file /resources/shared/scripts/dnn.dragDrop.js    was changed from 08.00.03 to 08.00.04, with a new function            var getModuleId = function ($mod) {              var result = $mod.attr(""""class"""").match(/DnnModule-([0-9]+)/);              return (result && result.length === 2) ? result[1] : null;          };    replacing the old one            var getModuleId = function ($mod) {              return $mod.find(""""a"""").first().attr(""""name"""");          };    Because DNN creates classes like DnnModule-[modulename] and DnnModule-[ModuleId], any module beginning with a number like """"27Blocks"""" or """"2sxc"""" will cause the new regex to capture the number of the module-name, instead of the module id.     The effect is, that when a module is drag-dropped, the server-api call gives the wrong medule-id (in our case number 2 instead of 406) as the module to move. Moving it with the menu still works. """
comments: "I believe the correct solution would be to use this regex: /DnnModule-([0-9]+)(?:\W|$)/" [SEP] "Hi [~accountid:<USER>, thanks for the suggestion. What about use this one: /DnnModule-([0-9]*$)/ to avoid any characters like ^,$,(,), etc?" [SEP] "@Ken (don't know how to put a real person here) - that won't suffice.     Reason is that the string isn't guaranteed to close right after that class - which is what the $ would require it to do. But you can have class=""DnnModule-2sxc DnnModule-403 someOtherClass"" so it's not certain to end with the DnnModule-###.    This is why my regex requires white-space OR end of line. " [SEP] "Ah, that makes sense, thanks for the response!. To me, ""\s"" is better since it only matches white space at the end. DnnModule-([0-9]+)(?:\s|$)" [SEP] "You can try \s but I'm not sure what else is in the string you are comparing. If it contains the quotes, then the string could end with ...DnnModule-343"" - in which case \s would fail. So please just run a few tests with the most common s

summary: "View Online Help button should open helpUrl link in new window"
description: """Currenlty, if module control have helpUrl specified in the manifest, help control adds iframe with helpUrl value as a source. View Online Help button is not used to open online help.    This approach have some issues:    * If helpUrl is specified for module control, general module info and help message from resources (ModuleHelp.Text) will not be displayed, so user could miss some important information (i.e. the online help website could be unavailable).  * Not every website allow display itself inside an iframe tag. So if you want to move module help i.e. to github project wiki - you out of luck.  * Not every website would ignore additional popup=true parameter, which is added to the original helpUrl if popups were enabled for the site (which may be subject of another issue).    Proposal:    * Always show module info and ModuleHelp.Text resource content in the help control.  * Display View Online Help button only if helpUrl is specified for the module control.  * Let View Online Help button be a hyperlink with href equals to raw helpUrl and target=""""_blank"""" attribute.            """

summary: "Package names should be case insensitive"
description: """When a package has a dependency on another package, that dependency is currently case sensitive.  Likewise, when installing a package, the search for duplicate packages (to determine if this is an upgrade, repair, etc.) is case sensitive.  This behavior should not be case sensitive.    h2. Scenario  The attached package  [^knockout-postbox_0.5.2_mismatch-dependency.zip] has a dependency on """"knockout,"""" whereas the package that comes with DNN has the name """"Knockout"""" with a capital _K_      h3.Steps to reproduce  * Install the attached [^knockout-postbox_0.5.2_mismatch-dependency.zip] into your DNN site    h3. Expected   * Package installs correctly    h3. Actual  * Package fails because of an unmet dependency      h2. Scenario  The attached package [^Knockout-PostBox_0.5.2_mismatch-package.zip] has the package name """"Knockout-PostBox,"""" whereas the package [^knockout-postbox_0.5.2.zip] has the lowercase package name """"knockout-postbox""""    h3.Steps to reproduce  * Install the attached [^knockout-postbox_0.5.2.zip] into your DNN site  * Install the attached [^Knockout-PostBox_0.5.2_mismatch-package.zip] into your DNN site    h3. Expected   * Second package install indicates package is already installed, asks to do repair install    h3. Actual  * Second package installs without indicating any issue"""

summary: "SI: IP Address Tracking when using a Load Balancer"
description: """Creating this ticket on behalf of client, please see findings below:    We are using a load balancer and the client IP address is placed into the HTTP_X-FORWARDED-FOR server variable. The REMOTE_ADDR (or HttpRequest.UserHostAddress) is set to the IP address of the load balancer. This is a requirement of the load balancer and cannot be changed.  There are 2 issues with this:    1) The IPAddress column in the Analytics_PageViews table is being set to the address of the NLB (REMOTE_ADDR), not the client (HTTP_X-FORWARDED-FOR)   2) The LastIPAddress in the Users table is also being set in the same way (REMOTE_ADDR rather than HTTP_X-FORWARDED-FOR).    I would also like to share the following observations:    1) The GetIPAddress method in DNN Platform\DotNetNuke.Web.Mvc\Routing\HttpRequestExtensions.cs demonstrates the proper way to discover the client IP address when using a load balancer although it is looking for X-FORWARDED-FOR.  2) The GetVisitorIPAddress in DNN Platform\Library\Services\GeneratedImage\IPCount.cs is another attempt at doing this but is using different logic and is looking for the HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR server variable.     Moving into backlog and tagging as Medium priority. This is an inconsistency that needs to be addressed. It is possible, with new Analytics enhancements, this will be fixed anyway. PM will evaluate for an upcoming release. """

I'm not sure if there's a better way to get the modules folder.  Or - if the """"UnInstall"""" method could be called on a failed """"Install"""" it may be better to write it as:          """

summary: "Navigate between portals clear the whole cache"
description: """For recreate this issue a user doesn't require to be logged in. If the user navigates to a portal (default language en-US) and later on navigate to other portal where this language hasn't been enabled, the host cache will be cleared in cascade.    Portal A:      # Default language en-US     # Content Localization not enabled    Portal B:     # More than one language enabled     # en-US language is disabled     # Content Localization enabled    1. Navigate to a site A with default language en-US. Ensure a cookie 'language' = 'en-US' has been created.  2. Navigate to a site B using the default portal alias. This site should have enabled more tha n one language and none of them should be en-US.    EXPECTED RESULT:      - The cache isn't cleared    ACTUAL RESULT:     - The cache is being cleared.    Other way to recreate this issue is navigating as a Host user to     [PortalA]/en-us/Host/Site-Management/portalid/0    Checking on DNN source code, the line that is being executed is         DataCache.ClearHostCache(true);    This is the line 2380 on the file PortalController.cs (DotNetNuke.Library). After comment out this line, our website performance has improved. I haven't detected any downside."""

summary: "All WebApi Calls on multi-language sites reset the language cookie"
description: """Any call to a WebApi on a secondary language causes the answer to contain a cookie-reset, which changes the language of following WebAPI calls to the primary language. Here's how to reproduce:    # create a 2-language site. Set primary language to en, secondary to de  # go to a page on the second language (de)  # add something which needs web-api calls and watch the trafic on fiddler  # You'll see that the call from the browser sent language de-DE, and the answer was also in de-DE (if the api is language sensitive). But at the same time, the response contains a new cookie to set the language to en-EN    From my analysis this seems to always happen, but probably didn't pop up yet because many api-calls are language-insensitive or because the page gets reloaded right afterwards, again resetting the cookie-language back to the language of the page.     the real impact in on SPAs though, which are language aware. because they will cause multiple requests to the server, and all the initial requests (done simultaneously) will contain the correct language, while following requests will contain the wrong language.    The screenshot shows fiddler tracking a web-request on a DE-portal in dnn 8.0.3 (but the problem has already existed in dnn 7.x) and you can see that it's a DE-call (the returned data was also DE), but the answer contains a """"set language to en"""" cookie.   Note that the following request three lines down already uses en-EN as the request language. """
comments: "Hi Daniel!    I can confirm this bug on all 7.x versions. It does not exist only when portal aliases exist for each language. For example:    1) Single alias ""localhost/dnn742"" produces the same error, because ServicesFramework method getServiceRoot does not return language in the URL.  2) However when we have extra aliases per language for the same portal ""localhost/dnn742/en-gb"" and ""localhost/dnn742/fr-fr"" getServiceRoot contains language in the URL and works properly.    I understand situation relates more to the client side and cookies, but may be this info can help too.    Serg"

summary: "Updating user profile more than once doesn't persist "
description: """When updating a user profile more than one time, the fields changed in the first time are persisted properly, but any further changes within a short period (60 minutes or less) are not persisted.    I tracked the issue and seems due to optimization changes done in DNN-8874 when caching the user profile. This is located in {{DNNProfileProvider.cs}} code file inside {{public override void GetUserProfile(ref UserInfo user)}} method. The caching should be invalidated upon save/update to solve this issue (or worst case scenario, removing this caching altogether).    QA testers *must* write test case(s) for this issue and add to automated tests."""

An un-authorized user will still get these notifications regardless of whether they can access the the site or not.  Once a users account is no longer authorized, emails should not be sent to that users email.     Steps to Reproduce:  - Start w/ Engage (it is the easiest to start w/ to test all of the possible emails)  - Create a test user as an admin/super user and add them to the Content Managers role  - Ensure you have content approval setup as a workflow on a page (remember this page because you are going to be making changes to it later)  - As this test user, logged in, click password reset link (to ensure you get this email)  - Logout as admin/super user  - As this test user, logged in, access the asset manager and subscribe to a folder (remember this folder as you will need it later)  - As this test user, logged in, Ask a question in the Answers module and ensure the user is subscribed to new questions (you could use any Engage module like this, just picked this for clarity)  - Logout and login as an administrator or super user  - Go to the users section and locate this test user, un-authorize them   - Perform the following actions to fire off notifications (as this admin/super user)  -- Add a file to the folder you subscribed the test user to  -- Ask a new question in the answers module  -- Make a change to the page that has content approval workflow applied and submit that change for approval    """

summary: "Searching for recipients can fail when numerous users share names"
description: """When attempting to search for a user to send a message to in the Message Center, searching for a user by their display name fails when the names are structured in a """"LastName, FirstName"""" format, or if there are numerous users with a common name, such as """"Smith, FirstName""""    We have a production site with around 500-600 users where a problem was reported that a user with the name """"Smith, Mary"""" was not being shown in the selection list.    Upon further investigation, it seems the service procedure that is used to search - DotNetNuke.Web.InternalServices.MessagingServiceController.Search(string q), has some hardcoded values that assumes the person will only be searching by DisplayName (which in this case is fine), and also that a result set of 10 entries is permitted. There seems to be no way of customizing this page size property.    By executing the stored procedure _GetUsersBasicSearch_, by using the hardcoded page size of 10, I can confirm that searching by the user's partial display name of """"Smith"""" will exclude this result due to the number of other users with display names that include """"Smith""""    Also it is impossible to be more specific with the way the DisplayName is structured on this site, because trying to specify """"Smith, Mary"""" will strip the comma out of the search string and query the database with the string """"SmithMary"""". I've attached a screenshot that shows this.    Again, if I execute the stored procedure with """"Smith, Mary"""", the result *will* be properly shown. However, since DNN rips the comma out of the query text before sending it, querying by """"SmithMary"""" will return no results. This behavior is being seen by the end user.    When attempting to search in a different way (starting with the name Mary), this possibly could work, but again the search assumes that only 10 results are wanted. Mary can be a common name, and there is no way to properly select this user.    Steps to recreate:    1. Create 15 users that have the last name """"Smith"""".  2. Ensure the DisplayName property for each of these users follows a [LastName, FirstName] format.  3. Clear portal caches if necessary to ensure the latest listing of users is populated into cache.  4. Navigate to the Message Center and Compose New Message  5. In the 'To' field, begin typing """"Smith"""".  6. Some results will not be shown (should only be the first 10 listed alphabetically)  7. Attempt to be more specific by including a comma, and the user's first name.  8. No results will be shown."""
comments: "what happens, if you continue typing the first name?" [SEP] "Either search turns up no results. Like I mentioned on my original request, the user in question had a first name Mary. If I type her first name, and her name doesn't come up in the first 10 results (Mary is a common name, just like John might be), I can't select the result I want. I can't continue typing her last name either because then it's looking for ""Mary lastname"" which won't match anything as the DisplayName is formatted with a comma, not a space.     Also if I try to input a comma to start typing her first name and filter down to less results, DNN strips the comma out of the search text (as I highlighted in the decompiled assembly in the attached screenshot) so it winds up being ""SmithMa--"" being sent to the database, which also returns no results."

summary: "DNN should only require .Net 4.5 to compile"
description: """DNN 8.0 has a minimum requirement of .Net 4.5 (.Net framework 4.0) in order to compile and run. In setting up a new machine, I have found that DNN includes a requirement to have both .Net 2 and .Net 4 framework due to certain dependencies.    DNN should remove dependencies on .Net Framework 2.0 so that it can compile and run on a machine with only .Net 4.5 installed.     Currently, the MSBuild Community Tasks is using an old version which was built against .Net 2.0.  This causes DNN to fail the build when trying to do a release build on a machine without .Net 2.0 framework installed."""

summary: "Users.LastModifiedOnDate is not updated when profile property is changed"
description: """DNN does not update the Users.LastModifiedOnDate field when any of the profile property is changed. Certain tools rely on this information to periodically sync DNN user information changes to 3rd party systems (CRM, email marketing, etc). There doesn't seem to be a way to extract this information from the API. Tools are forced to sync the entire contacts in database which could be thousands of users."""
comments: "each profile property has its own lastupdated column.  I am against overwriting the information in Users - especially, as profile properties are per portal.  Better would be a database function UserLastUpdated(@PortalID, @UserID), which retrieves latest modification date from all user data for this site or all sites (@PortalID Is Null or  -1)" [SEP] "There may not be a need to overwrite the Users.LastModifiedOnDate. Maybe, a good approach is to expose a new UserInfo.Profile.LastModifiedOnDate property in the API that would show the max newest changed date from the valid profile fields. Currently, this field information is not available so we can't loop through the users and find only those that changed." [SEP] "Profile is a collection and IMO you would Need the latest updated date from users, userportals and userprofile tables." [SEP] "btw, this is not a bug, but an enhancement request.  DNN usually updates users table as well, when a user is updated, even if just a profile property is affected."

summary: "Add multiple MVC Modules in same page"
description: """Prerequisite: user opens a DNN page (except home page).    1. Go to Modules in control panel > Add new modules.  2. Drag a MVC module to page.  3. Go to Modules > Add new modules again.  4. Drag any module to page.    Expected result: we have 2 modules in this active page.    Actual result: the 2nd module wasn't displayed in active page. It appears in Home page.    Reason: The service-framework request doesn't attach TabId to the request-header if there is any MVC module in active page.    Solution:  The problem comes from dnn.js. Sometimes the dnn.getVars() returns the empty object/array. I added the below row to do the hot fix in dnn.js:  *if (this.vars == null || this.vars.length === 0)* ----> We need to compare if it is a zero array, it should be assign again from __dnnVariable hidden field.  """

summary: "PB General: Allow user to open/close Persona Bar without losing context"
description: """As a structured content user, I often find that I shift back and forth between the DNN page and the structured content tab.  Whether it is editing content, updating visualizer styles or updating javascript, I am constantly shifting from the persona bar, to the page and back to the persona bar quite a lot.    As a user I would like a method to shift between viewing a screen in the persona bar and viewing the DNN page, and then shifting back to where I was in the persona bar.  This feature would streamline the workflow for tasks where I am creating something in the persona bar and then trying to see the change in the website as a result.  """

summary: "SI: Recycle Bin should have sorting options"

If this keeps coming up, we may reconsider in 2018 or later. "

summary: "SI: Upload tab in Advanced Editor Image Properties window issue."
description: """DESCRIPTION:   New Roles are not able to get Upload tab on Image Properties window in Advanced Editor unless they are added as one of the default Admin Roles but there is a strange behavior.     Steps to replicate: Scenario 1:    1. Create a new Role and a new user.   2. Add the Role to the user or vice versa.   3. Go to: Host (adv settings) > HTML Editor Manager > File Browser Settings > Check the box for the new Role.   4. Log into Dnn as a user in the new Role > Edit Page > go to Advanced Editor > Click Image icon > you cannot see Upload tab on Image Properties window.   5. Expected behavior: There should be an Upload tab (Unless designed this way).    Steps to replicate: Scenario 2:   1. Now go back to the User and add Content Manager Role.   2. But, do not check the box for Content Manager in HTML Editor Manager > File Browser Settings.   3. Log in as the new User > Edit page (from persona bar) > go to Advanced Editor > Click Image icon > you CAN see Upload tab on Image Properties window.     Steps to replicate: Scenario 3:  1. Now go back to the new User and remove the New Role but keep the Content Manager Role.   2. Log in as the new User > Edit page (from persona bar) > go to Advanced Editor > Click Image icon > you CANNOT see Upload tab on Image Properties window.     Steps to replicate: Scenario 4:  1. Now, go to: Host (adv settings) > HTML Editor Manager > File Browser Settings > Check the box for the Content Manager Role.   2. Log in as the new User > Edit page (from persona bar) > go to Advanced Editor > Click Image icon > you CAN see Upload tab on Image Properties window.     CONCLUSION:   1. You CANNOT see the upload button for any new Role despite checking the box in HTML Editor Manager > File Browser Settings (Unless by design).  2. You CAN see the upload button for any new Role if you add another default Role for the new User even though the default Role has no box checked under HTML Editor Manager > File Browser Settings.  3. You CANNOT see the upload button for default Role if the box is not checked in HTML Editor Manager > File Browser Settings"""

summary: "Updating settings changes content of module"
description: """When updating module settings, the content of the module is overwritten with the module title. Causes data loss in custom modules using ContentItem.Content.   The bugfix is a partial rollback of DNN-6578. """
comments: "[~accountid:<USER> Can you provide more details about what you mean (what modules are impacted, if you disable the container in the module settings, which is under Page Settings tab, does the title content show, etc.)?     I reviewed the committed code DNN-6578 and this was setting the body of content for the main content item (in the API and database), this won't change the content within the module itself (whatever the module is, it is producing it's own content that isn't this data). I do see that the commit there was only setting 50% of what it should be setting (Content.Content is being set, it should also be setting Content.ContentTitle too).     QA Testing: When creating/changing a page name, the content item for the tab should have it's Content set as well as ContentTitle. If a module title is added/updated (via the module settings screen), we should also be updating the content item's Content & ContentTitle values. " [SEP] "Hello Luke;  AFAIK you are the only person who has reported this issue, ever

summary: "SI: Reduce reliance on javascript for general page functions"
description: """Here is some feedback we received directly from a customer:    bq.   bq. I'm no longer getting the expected list of themes and containers in the page settings.   bq.   bq. When I go to the page settings I don't see """"Porto"""" anywhere in the Themes or Containers option dropdowns. The page itself is actually set up with the Porto H2 Title Container but no Porto options are appearing in the dropdowns anymore so I can't change the page container (trying to change it to Porto - No Title or similar).  bq.   bq. I'm also having a similar issue when trying to edit the module (the HTML Pro module) on the page. It only gives me options to select Porto H2 Title and Porto H3 Title containers for the module. It should be listing out all the Porto containers, of which there are a bunch through H6 (as well as notitle, which is no longer an option).  bq.       bq. So - this has to do, I think, with the way everything on DNN is loaded via AJAX calls.  bq.   bq. Because for some reason you guys aren't using standard HTML forms but your own JavaScript versions, they are not always populating the entire area or dropdown or whatever with the data before """"finishing"""". Somehow they are getting interrupted or aren't finishing every time, so you end up with half of the list or whatever it is that's being loaded, missing.  bq.   bq. I just noticed this same exact issue when trying to change the HTML editor settings - when I came to the Host -> HTML Editor Manager settings, it only showed me six or so of the options. After clearing my cache and coming back to the page, I see there's now a hundred options, including the one I was looking for (turning off HTML autoformatting/""""purification"""" which is screwing up my HTML in some spots).  bq.   bq. I don't think this is an issue specific to my system. This happened on my desktop in Chrome, no ad blocker enabled, and it was a similar situation in Firefox on my laptop yesterday.  bq.   bq. There's really too much overreliance on AJAX calls to load everything.   bq.   bq. I don't know who designed this, but it's terrible, and I can see similar issues with every form field etc. being loaded by a separate AJAX call. I'm not surprised there's an issue with the calls sometimes dying or whatever's going on with the missing data or the data not getting fully loaded into the page, but it's something on your end. I wish I could provide more information beyond this general rant and had any hope of it being fixed.        """

summary: "Page Hierarchy not being updated in other languages when moving a page"
description: """STEPS:   1. Navigate to Host >> Host Settings >> Other Settings.   2. Enable """"Allow Content Localization"""".   3. Create a site using the Default Website Template.   4. Navigate to Admin >> Languages   5. Add a new Language (i.e. French Canada)   6. Enable the language.   7. Click on button """"Enable Localized Content""""   8. Tick """"Make all pages Translatable""""   9. Click """"Enable Content Localization""""   10. Activate Frech (Canada)   11. Click on the Publish icon and then """"Yes"""".   12. Navigate to Admin >> Page Management (Default Language)   13. Create a new Page under Home page   14. Navigate to Admin >> Page Management (French Language)   15. Ensure the page has been created and it is in the correct location (under Home page)   16. Navigate to Admin >> Page Management (Default Language)   17. Move the page one level up on the hierarchy (i.e. under the root)   18. Navigate to Admin >> Page Management (French Language)     EXPECTED RESULT:   The page has been moved to the correct location in all languages     ACTUAL RESULT:   The page gets moved only on the current language, in this case the default one"""
comments: "As in my notes on DNN--8871 you missed a section in the *Languages* module    You never clicked into the Content Localization tab.  You need to do that then select the page you wish to have completely translated.  Then tick Translate and/or Publish boxes and the Update button.  If you don't manually translate the page you have not complete Translation for that specific page    Please see this help document:  http://www.dnnsoftware.com/help#Dnn.Platform/Documentation/Advanced%20Site%20Management/Content%20Localization/Translating/01 Translating a Page.html"

summary: "Logout not redirecting to the correct page after ""Content Localization"" has been enabled"
description: """After a user logs out, he is being redirected to the Login page on the wrong language.    STEPS:   1. Navigate to Host >> Host Settings >> Other Settings.   2. Enable """"Allow Content Localization"""".   3. Create a site using the Default Website Template.   4. Navigate to Admin >> Page Management   5. Create a new Page and call it """"Logon""""   6. Ensure the page has the role """"All Users"""" assigned   7. Add the Account Login module to the page   8. Ensure the Home page is only accessible by Registered Users   9. Navigate to Admin >> Site Settings >> Advance Settings    10. Set the recently created """"Logon"""" page as your Login page   11. Navigate to Admin >> Languages for the site just created.   12. Add a new Language (i.e. French Canada)   13. Enable the language.   14. Click on button """"Enable Localized Content""""   15. Tick """"Make all pages Translatable""""   16. Click """"Enable Content Localization""""   17. Activate Frech (Canada)   18. Click on the Publish icon and then """"Yes"""".   19. Navigate to the Logon page and ensure it has set as transtaled and published on all languages   20. Register a user using and assign it the French language   21. Login with the user   22. Logout     EXPECTED RESULT:   You are redirected to the frech login page     ACTUAL RESULT:   The user is getting redirected to the default language (en-US)     There is a workaround for this. You can the """"Redirect after logout"""" setting on the Site Settings."""
comments: "  The actual issue is that unless you manually *Translate* each page none of the pages except for Host/Admin pages are actually translated to any other language than the main site language    *Make all pages Translatable* does not Translate any of the pages. We're simply copying the page,it's content and modules and re-creating under an *es-es* folder    If you do not click *Content Localization* tab, select the page you wish to have completely translated and then tick *Translate* and/or *Publish* boxes and *Update* you have not complete *Translation* for that specific page    Please see this help document:   http://www.dnnsoftware.com/help#Dnn.Platform/Documentation/Advanced%20Site%20Management/Content%20Localization/Translating/01 Translating a Page.html" [SEP] "Even with all relevant pages localized to French and the user set to French locale the log out redirects to the base site language  See attached .mp4 file"

summary: "Folders Loading Performance Enhancement"
description: """This task aims at enhancing folders loading performance for sites with large amount of folders."""
comments: "From my experience, one of the biggest source of performance issues are user folders and its permissions on sites with large user base (like www.dnnsoftware.com).  My suggestions:  # create user folders not before a user tries to upload the first file.  # add an option to fake folderpermissions for user folders. Currently, there are 5 folderpermission records created per user folder -  which are usually never modified by the admin. We may simply take permissions of /users folder and add all permissions for the folder owner virtually in DNN API  Both suggestions should improve folder performance on large sites dramatically.   " [SEP] "[~accountid:<USER>, thanks for the suggestions. Actually, the first one is already in place for a while now, and the second is a good candidate for consideration. I'm working on a different approach now where I load the permissions for a specific folder only instead of all the permissions at once which will increase performance greatly for such sites." summary: "Child portal creation - Home and subsequent pages have no data in them"
description: """Install latest Platform 8.0.5 bulid  Log in as *Host*  Create 1 new page  In HTML module create a link to a single image  EG: /Portals/0/Users/003/03/3/<file name>.jpg  Save and make the page *Public*    Go *Host > Site Management*  Click *Export Site Template*  Name the Template  Provide a description  Do *not* check off *Include Content* or *Include Files*  Verify everything is checked under *Pages to Export*    Click *Export Template*    Once the template export is complete close the pop up  Click """"Add new Site*  Select *Parent* or *Child* and path/title appropriately  Under *Template* select the *Template* you created above  Click *Create Site* button    After site is complete log into the new portal    Actual Result:  There's no data in the Home page or any user created pages    There are no error messages in the Event Viewer on the site or the log file in the folder path *\<site name>\Portals\_default\Logs*    Expected Result:  All pages have the same data as was in the site where the export took place      """

summary: "Each Install of a Module Leaves Orphaned Records in ContentItems & Related Tables"
description: """Each time a module is installed, regardless of if the modules """"Friendly Name"""" is changed, new entries are added to the Content Items table.  This results in content item values that are not used, yet are duplicates.  In the case of environments with continuous deploys this overhead can get great exaggerated.    For a test, lookup in the """"ContentItems"""" table the friendly name of a module.  Re-install that modules to your portal.  You will notice the same text value will be added to the content items table with a new ID.    Expected results are to NOT have a duplication.  Either by re-using the old value, or by clearing out the old value after inserting the new one."""
comments: "This is verified in Platform 8.2; 8.3; 8.4 and 8.5    I just installed XModPro 5.6 2 times  After the 2nd time these are the records in the ContentIems table    ContentItemID Content ContentTypeID TabID ModuleID ContentKey Indexed CreatedByUserID CreatedOnDate LastModifiedByUserID LastModifiedOnDate StateID  191 XModPro 3 -1 -1  0 1 2016-08-22 14:56:37.770 1 2016-08-22 14:56:37.770 NULL  192 XModPro 3 -1 -1  0 1 2016-08-22 15:00:17.030 1 2016-08-22 15:00:17.030 NULL" [SEP] "due to the fact that ContentItems does not contain a ModuleDefID, it requires the module to use a valid ModuleID and any delete of modules needs to delete records with appropriate ModuleID as well (using referential integrity or explicit statement in stored procedures)" [SEP] "Batch update of issues that won't be addressed due to change in functionality from version 9.0"

summary: "Autocomplete Tag Causes HTML Validation Failure"
description: """DNN is adding an autocomplete=""""off"""" attribute to a hidden form field that is added to every DNN page.      *Issue*  By doing this all DNN pages will fail W3C validation for HTML as you can only have the autocomplete=""""off"""" value on user input types, hidden elements cannot.  All DNN pages render the below HTML.    <input name=""""__dnnVariable"""" type=""""hidden"""" id=""""__dnnVariable"""" autocomplete=""""off"""" />    *Desired Behavior*  The desired behavior is for DNN to be able to pass a strict HTML5 validation, which would require this value to not be set.    *Impacts to Users*  For those looking to prove WCAG/Section 508 compliance these items cause automated tools to not certify the sites as compliant."""
comments: "For info :  In the past  autocomplete=""off"" was already removed. See DNN-4651  Due to issue in CONTENT it was reverted : DNN-6210"

summary: "Hidden Link to a Module should use id over name for HTML 5 Standards"
description: """For those looking to achieve HTML5 compliance the DNN platform currently renders HTML that will not pass the standard validation. This includes the various hidden """"Module Links"""" . *Recreation* View the source of a page within DNN and you will see many links similar to this. It is a simple anchor where the name is set to the module id. *Issue* Per the HTML5 specification, the tag does not have a name attribute and linking should be done using an id. Spec on A Tag: [From W3C|https://dev.w3.org/html5/html-author/#the-a-element] Spec on Navigating to a Fragment: [From W3C|http://w3c.github.io/html/browsers.html#scroll-to-fragid] *Impact* Due to this impact, no site will pass an HTML standards validation without warnings. This for some compliance standards will render a site as non-conforming. """

summary: "CK Editor Provider Doesn't Clear Portal Settings after Portal Delete"
description: """If you delete a portal within DNN the CKEditor configuration values for the deleted portal are not removed from the CKE_Settings table.  This appears to be related to a design specific issue however due to the inline-references to the Portal Id.  The """"SettingName"""" values in the CKE_Settings table are stored in the following format. DNNCKP#<portalID>#<settingname>    *Recreation Steps*    Create a DNN Portal, after creation use the CK Editor settings options to make a portal specific configuration.  You should now see multiple records stored to the CKE_Settings table (In my testing around 200+ records per portal).      Delete the portal used for the testing.  After deletion query the CKE_Settings table and you will see all of the settings for the deleted portal still there    *Expected behavior *    It would be expected that this information clean itself up after the portal deletion to avoid bloating the table, and/or having data that is no longer valid or part of the configuration  """
comments: "the problem is the structure of CKE_Settings, which uses a composite text key instead of a column for PortalID, which could benefit from referential integrity constraints."

summary: "CKEditor Provider: Does Not Respect Folder Provider Behavior"
description: """Currently the CK Editor does not call out to the provider to get the URL structures and uses LinkClick for all linking.  This results in various behavior issues:    * Improper links after upload  * Links that require DNN to process, just to send to a CDN  * Other Display Formatting issues    A folder provider should be requested to give the link and let it control if LinkClick should be used. summary: "SI: CKEditor Link Type 'Portal Page' does not display correct locale pages"
description: """It has been found that the current locale is not respected when setting a link in CKEditor using the 'Link' option to set a Link Type as a 'Portal Page' when the urlformat is set as 'Standard' and the portal id is not = to '0'. If the portal id is non-zero and urlformat=""""standard"""", then the Link Type """"Portal Page"""" will only display pages from the default locale, not the current locale.    Steps to Reproduce:  1. In an Evoq 8.3.0 or new version, set urlformat=""""standard"""" in the web.config.  2. Setup a new portal - child or parent does not make a difference.  3. In the new portal, setup a new locale and enable content localization.  4. Publish pages in the new locale and edit an Html module. In the editor, click on the link icon and set the Link Type as """"Portal Page"""".  5. Open the 'Page from within your Portal' dropdown menu.    Expected results: The menu show pages from the current locale.  Actual Results: The menu displays pages from the default locale in any portal other than portal 0."""

summary: "Affiliate is no longer being tracked"
description: """Even after installing the Vendors module that is now separate from the core and adding a valid authorized vendor and affiliate entry, the site will no longer track the AffiliateId being passed in the URL on any page. Traditionally, you can attach the AffiliateId=2 query string parameter against any page and it would create an AffiliateId cookie.     This format must continue to work since there are potentially thousands of partner/vendor sites that may have already published links that point back with the affiliate tracking information expecting to be paid commissions for their referrals.    The Default.aspx.cs file appears to have removed the section where it used to track the affiliate cookie.    protected override void OnPreRender(EventArgs evt)          {              base.OnPreRender(evt);                //process the current request              if (!Globals.IsAdminControl())              {                  ManageRequest();              }  ...        private void ManageRequest()          {              //affiliate processing              int affiliateId = -1;              if (Request.QueryString[""""AffiliateId""""] != null)              {                  if (Regex.IsMatch(Request.QueryString[""""AffiliateId""""], """"^\\d+$""""))                  {                      affiliateId = Int32.Parse(Request.QueryString[""""AffiliateId""""]);                      var objAffiliates = new AffiliateController();                      objAffiliates.UpdateAffiliateStats(affiliateId, 1, 0);                        //save the affiliateid for acquisitions                      if (Request.Cookies[""""AffiliateId""""] == null) //do not overwrite                      {                          var objCookie = new HttpCookie(""""AffiliateId"""", affiliateId.ToString(""""D""""))                          {                              Expires = DateTime.Now.AddYears(1),                              Path = (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Globals.ApplicationPath) ? Globals.ApplicationPath : """"/"""")                          };                          Response.Cookies.Add(objCookie);                      }                  }              }                //site logging              if (PortalSettings.SiteLogHistory != 0)              {                  //get User ID                    //URL Referrer                  string urlReferrer = """""""";                  try                  {                      if (Request.UrlReferrer != null)                      {                          urlReferrer = Request.UrlReferrer.ToString();                      }                  }                  catch (Exception exc)                  {                      Logger.Error(exc);                    }                  string strSiteLogStorage = Host.SiteLogStorage;                  int intSiteLogBuffer = Host.SiteLogBuffer;                    //log visit                  var objSiteLogs = new SiteLogController();                    UserInfo objUserInfo = UserController.Instance.GetCurrentUserInfo();                  objSiteLogs.AddSiteLog(PortalSettings.PortalId, objUserInfo.UserID, urlReferrer, Request.Url.ToString(),                                         Request.UserAgent, Request.UserHostAddress, Request.UserHostName,                                         PortalSettings.ActiveTab.TabID, affiliateId, intSiteLogBuffer,                                         strSiteLogStorage);              }          }      """

summary: "Page Manger Allows Duplicate Pages via Drag & Drop"
description: """Via standard page creation methods a duplicate check is completed to ensure that a page with the same name doesn't exist already.  However, when re-ordering pages this change doesn't happen and can have disastrous results.    *Consider 2 examples:*    The use of > indicates a child relationship for the page.    _Example 1:_ Create a site structure such as the following    Test Page  Test Page 2  >Test Page    Within page manager, drag the """"> Test Page""""  to the root.  You will see an error, but now the page will be there.  You cannot edit the settings for the page, but the site itself seems to function.    _Example 2_ Create a page structure similar to the following    Test Page  >Admin    Within page manager, drag the """"> Admin"""" to the root.  Your entire site will now be non-functional and you will have to modify the database to restore things.    Due to the impact of #2 this is a high priority issue."""
